programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Juliette is back and wants to see Carl. Laurel worries about Gabby's future. Nate tries to ready himself

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sarah is pleased when Lucas calls at Underworld to do business, but Carla masks her discomfort. Steve is put out to discover that Eileen's arranged for Tim to drive the hearse at Ted's funeral. Simon shows off to Jacob, telling him about his criminal past as a gang member

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh makes over a garden in Newark, Nottinghamshire, for a double-amputee veteran Nathan Cumberland and his young family. Despite his injuries, through his work with the Defence Medical Welfare Service charity, Nathan has devoted his life outside the armed forces to supporting older and elderly veterans who are often less likely to seek help for themselves than their younger counterparts. With tips on how to create a beautiful woodland themed outdoor space, Alan, Katie Rushworth, Frances Tophill and David Domoney take on Nathan's inaccessible plot and transform it into a show-stopping family garden

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Unaware that he overheard her conversation with Lucas, Carla is bewildered to see Peter so down. Alya opens the pile of final demands with mounting concern. George gives Steve and Tim a dry run at driving the hearse to see who's best

programme.title: Unforgotten
programme.desc: A dismembered body is found in a scrapyard and the team believes the remains had been stored in a domestic freezer for 30 years. Meanwhile, after making the decision to retire from the police force, Cassie faces a dilemma when she learns she isn't entitled to her full pension payment unless she completes her 30 years of service. Return of the crime drama, starring Nicola Walker and Sanjeev Bhaskar

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Piers Morgan's Life Stories
programme.desc: Former boxer Chris Eubank talks about his private life and career, touching on his teenage years as a shoplifter, his divorce, bankruptcy and his victory in 1990 over fierce rival Nigel Benn. Chris also recalls the 1991 fight in which his opponent Michael Watson received a near-fatal brain injury, and discusses the success of his son, Chris Eubank Jr

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Nate feels guilty, Laurel is determined to be supportive, and Vinny and Liv are all loved up

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Leanne shows Simon another feather from Oliver and asserts that it's his way of letting her know that he's fine. However, Nick is concerned by her behaviour. Abi and Kevin celebrate their engagement, and the arrival of Ed's brother Ronnie puts Aggie on edge

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revival of the supermarket-based game show in which three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles to win a £3,000 prize. The rebooted show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces

programme.title: Love Bites
programme.desc: Scarlett Moffatt hosts, as singleton Rashaun chooses to date one of Harley, Naomi and Keelie - not on their looks but their cooking skills. After picking his favourite menu, the cook behind it reveals themselves and joins him for a date

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: Healthcare co-ordinator Brad from Pontefract in West Yorkshire puts his faith in the fashion choices of Ashley, James and Mike

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Guest hosts Garth Brooks and Trisha Yearwood talk to Ciara and Russell Wilson. Plus, magician and former NFL player Jon Dorenbos performs magic

programme.title: Love Bites
programme.desc: Jack, Darren and Felix all attempt to make a seafood linguine from scratch in order to win a date with 22-year-old Ellie from London

programme.title: The Masked Singer US
programme.desc: The contestants in the final group take to the stage for their first performance, featuring Squiggly Monster, Mushroom, Jellyfish, Broccoli and Lips

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness presents the dating show, with a stripper, a farmer and a gymnast and Scarlett Moffatt's ex-boyfriend entering the 'love lift', and giving it their all in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date. But they must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity edition of the game show, asking contestants Richard Osman, Gregg Wallace and Penny Lancaster to 'see it and say it' as they try to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. After the first elimination, the two remaining players battle to reach the Super Catchphrase round, where one of them could win £50,000 for the charity of their choice

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring sleepy time, summer time, and scary time

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Comedian Harry Hill narrates a selection of camcorder calamities and viewers' mobile-phone footage, featuring clever animals, out-of-control teenagers and painful encounters with basketballs

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy decides she wants to be a manager, so Glenn resolves to teach her everything he knows - but her first task ends in disaster. Mateo and Cheyenne plan to start their own business

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy and Cheyenne attend Cloud 9 Academy to advance their careers, while Dina and Garrett get roped into babysitting Glenn's daughter while he childproofs his office

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter loses his wallet at a Barry Manilow concert, where it is found by actor James Woods, who is intent on revenge and uses it to steal his identity - not to mention Lois and the children

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian discover the people who moved in to Cleveland's old house are spies, and follow them on a mission to Russia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Alex Borstein

programme.title: The Stand Up Sketch Show
programme.desc: Routines by comedians including Kojo Anim, Tessa Coates, Luke McQueen, Seann Walsh, Dane Baptiste, Janine Harouni, Larry Dean and Tom Parry are reconstructed as sketches

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie auditions in drag for his favourite TV show after discovering it is only searching for girls, and soon becomes a hit with viewers. Meg shocks the entire city by dating a conventionally attractive boy

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg starts a relationship with oversexed neighbour Quagmire after celebrating her 18th birthday, but Peter stops at nothing to end his daughter's fledgling romance

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve looks after Roger's ex-tumour Rogu to prove to Francine that he is ready for the responsibility of babysitting

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Thanks to Roger, Snot discovers his dead father was a demolition derby driver. Hayley takes Steve on a road trip so he can learn to drive

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Cookie is upset when Freight Train misses their wedding anniversary party and decides to go on tour with George Clinton and the P-Funk All-Stars. Cleveland convinces him to track his wife down and regain her trust, while Cleveland Jr poses as an insurance executive in an office supplies shop

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Rallo believes he is a good bowler because he can score strikes with the guard rail up, leaving Donna to deliver an awkward truth. Meanwhile, Cleveland, Lester, Holt and Terry feel their friendship is too predictable, so decide to make it more exciting by taking a trip to an abandoned theme park

programme.title: Superstore

programme.desc: Three potential suitors, Brian, Elmo and Michael, compete for the affections of Lauren from Milton Keynes

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Charity is all alone, it remains to be seen whether Rishi will listen to her advice, and Nicola makes a secret call

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a selection of comical clips filmed by viewers on their camcorders and mobile phones, featuring a Prince Harry impersonator, boys being boys, and a DJ

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Ellen chats to Allison Janney, who tells her all about Mom and Breaking News in Yuba County. Plus, she video chats with teacher Kelly Klein from Falcon Heights

programme.title: Love Bites
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Claire from Scotland is hoping her love of food will help her find her ideal date. Dating show, hosted by Scarlett Moffatt

programme.title: The Masked Singer US
programme.desc: The final three singers from group A take the stage for their final chance at the super six, but only two can progress to the next round. Will it be Sun, Snow Owls or Popcorn who are unmasked at the end of the show?

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: Mountain-biking champion Tom, plus-sized model and author Peter, Royal Marine Joel and musician Caolan are the latest candidates to enter the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval. Paddy McGuinness presents

programme.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts the game show, asking Strictly Come Dancing professional Oti Mabuse, tennis coach Judy Murray and actor-comedian John Thomson to guess the familiar phrases hidden in animated clues. One of them will make it through to the Super Catchphrase round, where they could win £50,000 for the charity of their choice

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps in a show that reveals what former PM David Cameron got up to behind the bins at Chequers. Plus, the host reveals the reason why Lorraine Kelly is testing Ross King's thongs

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Surreal comedy from the mind of Harry Hill, inspired by viewers' clips, featuring the horrors of the Harry Styles Finishing School, the terrifying sight of Beyonce without her make-up, and Sarah Millican fighting for her fame with her trusty nunchaku

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Jonah and Amy's first Valentine's Day together gets derailed when Dina brings her birds to work. Cheyenne gives Marcus a tattoo

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy jumps at an amazing career opportunity, only to run up against an executive with a major grudge against her. Jonah and Mateo help Glenn with a financial problem, while Garrett and Cheyenne struggle to spend a day without cell phones

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Griffins find themselves stuck in Springfield, home to the Simpsons, after fleeing Quahog when Peter faces a backlash over a misogynistic comic strip

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Conclusion of the story in which the Griffin family are stuck in Springfield, home to the Simpsons, after Peter creates a controversial comic strip

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter goes on a second honeymoon with Lois in an effort to put the spark back into their marriage, and tries to get an upgrade on their hotel suite by impersonating Mel Gibson. Meanwhile, Chris gets into trouble for having alcohol at a school dance - despite protesting it was not his

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter loses his wallet at a Barry Manilow concert, where it is found by actor James Woods, who is intent on revenge and uses it to steal his identity - not to mention Lois and the children

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian discover the people who moved in to Cleveland's old house are spies, and follow them on a mission to Russia. Animated comedy, with the voices of Seth MacFarlane and Alex Borstein

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: A misunderstanding at school leads to Steve receiving an F on a test, and Stan jumps to the conclusion that his previously nerdy son has gone off the rails

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan is upset when Francine has a sexual dream about Jeff and tries to stop her from sleeping

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Jonah and Amy's first Valentine's Day together gets derailed when Dina brings her birds to work. Cheyenne gives Marcus a tattoo

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy jumps at an amazing career opportunity, only to run up against an executive with a major grudge against her. Jonah and Mateo help Glenn with a financial problem, while Garrett and Cheyenne struggle to spend a day without cell phones

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the singing contest in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. In the first episode, Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall and Ken Jeong make up the panel, trying to identify the performers inside a bee, a duck, a unicorn, a hedgehog, a butterfly and a chameleon

programme.title: Iain Stirling's CelebAbility
programme.desc: Iain Stirling hosts this game show in which five friends take on Georgia Kousoulou, Ellie Taylor, Jamie Laing, Ben Hanlin and Desiree Burch in a series of challenges

programme.title: FYI Extra
programme.desc: Short bulletin rounding up the day's showbusiness stories

programme.title: ITV2 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Martin tells Nick he is worried about him getting involved with Leanne. Mike is furious to discover Angie has blown the contract. Sally breaks down and is comforted by Chris

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Sally and Chris spend the night together. Angie is upset by Mike's attitude. Nick informs Gail that he is finished with Leanne. Jon tells Deirdre about his promotion at work

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim hands over information from Steve's office to the police. Jack is furious when Robert punches Donna in the face. Steve tells Kim that he is going to plead guilty

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The temporary Woolpack in the village hall starts taking shape. Mrs Kirk surprises Paddy with a free trip to Venice. Spalding threatens Steve with an attempted murder charge

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Oscar's golfing pal asks him to investigate the disappearance of his son, who left home after a blazing row with his overbearing father and has been spotted frequenting a club in Whitby. Meanwhile, the Aidensfield police officers are baffled by the activities of a modern-day Robin Hood, who has committed a string of burglaries and given away his ill-gotten gains to the elderly residents of a new block of flats. Drama, starring Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid arranges a fishing weekend, blissfully unaware Jean's father is coming to stay. Classic family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin and Chrissy go babysitting, but the baby will not stop crying, and the drinks cupboard is locked. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin fails his catering exams and decides to apply for a job in Southampton. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A disgruntled client falls under suspicion when an insurance salesman is found murdered, but the victim's complicated private life gives Mason a lot to think about before the case is solved. Alf Ventress makes himself at home in the Aidensfield Arms while his house undergoes repairs, and soon overstays his welcome, while a drunk locked up in the cells for a night turns out to be a war hero friend of Sgt Miller fallen on hard times

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The police dig up Kim's garden looking for the money. Mandy tells Butch he has to smarten himself up for the wedding. Terry and Alan have a showdown in the pub

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy confronts Mandy about the wedding. Kim visits Steve at the remand centre. Butch enlists Biff's help to change his image. Chelsea continues bullying Robert at school

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Les panics when he wins big on the races but cannot find the ticket. Deirdre and Jon look for a house to buy. Nick and Leanne meet in secret

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Les spreads the news that Ken is a pervert. Liz is not happy about her 40th birthday approaching. Kevin is not keen when Natalie invites him to a dinner party with her friends

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the death of a local aristocrat who seemingly died of a coronary - shortly after declaring he had an important announcement to make. After the peer's will disappears and his lawyer is killed in an arson attack, it is clear sinister forces are at work. However, the prime suspects all appear to have cast-iron alibis. Guest starring Joss Ackland and Sian Phillips, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A cleaner is found dead in her home and suspicion immediately falls upon her lodger, who is arrested and convicted of her murder. It appears to be an open-and-shut case, but Superintendent Spence begins to question the man's guilt and invites Poirot to help uncover the identity of the real killer. The Belgian sleuth teams up with crime writer Ariadne Oliver (My Family's Zoe Wanamaker) as he tries to crack the case. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Richard Hope, Joe Absolom, Amanda Root, Sian Phillips and Raquel Cassidy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An actress engaged to marry a foreign prince becomes the police's number one suspect in the murder of a shady producer. Desperate to ensure she escapes prosecution, her wealthy fiance asks Poirot to catch the real killer. Unfortunately, the celebrated detective ends up concluding she has lied - or is an accomplice. David Suchet stars, with Niamh Cusack, Abigail Cruttenden and Sean Pertwee

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: After finding out at the age of 19 that the man who raised him was not his real dad, former British soldier David Smith yearns to find the biological father he has never met. After years of dreaming, he hopes to finally know what it feels like to be called 'son'. Meanwhile, Mandy Hearn, who was adopted as a baby in 1968, hopes to trace her birth mother. However, at just 13 years old when she gave birth, she is the youngest biological mother the programme has ever encountered. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Fact-based drama starring David Tennant as notorious serial killer Dennis Nilsen. On 9 February 1983, Detective Chief Inspector Peter Jay is called to the leafy north London address of 23 Cranley Gardens, where he discovers the drains clogged with rotting human flesh and bones. But the extent of this grisly discovery only becomes apparent when the culprit returns from work. Dennis Nilsen, a meek man, freely admits to the police that it's not just one or two bodies, but as many as 15 or 16. As the police try to secure a conviction and identify the victims from scant DNA evidence, biographer Brian Masters attempts to understand why. A game of chess with 'Des' begins, and while Brian may be exhilarated by his newest subject, he's unaware what this new obsession could do to his life. Also starring Daniel Mays, Jason Watkins and Barry Ward

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Crime drama following the personal and professional lives of two detectives working for a Manchester police unit that specialises in murder cases. DC Janet Scott (Lesley Sharp) and DC Rachel Bailey (Suranne Jones) investigate the case of a pregnant woman who was killed in her bedroom. Meanwhile, Rachel's love life takes a turn for the worse and Janet gets a call that reawakens a past tragedy. Also starring Rupert Graves, Amelia Bullmore and Nicholas Gleaves

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike attempts to earn some cash without Sid's interference. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid returns home from work to be greeted with Sally's shocking news. Family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The girls find it tough sharing with one man, but their problems double once Robin's friend Larry moves in. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's hopes for a night of romance are dashed when Chrissy decides to supervise his girlfriend's visit. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Nokes arrives to take charge after a lorry driver is savagely beaten and his consignment of condemned meat is stolen on the way to the incinerator, causing a health alert in Aidensfield. Peggy gets involved when she is asked to house-sit Mrs Grant's mansion and takes advantage of the opportunity to run a makshift B&B, only to find herself under arrest for handling stolen goods

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chelsea is excluded from school. Chris pays Steve a surprise visit. Kathy discharges herself from hospital. Kim's deal falls through because of Steve's reputation

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon thinks there is an intruder at the diner. Butch is distraught when Mandy invites Zak and Lisa to his romantic dinner. Laura is pleased her evening with Chris went well

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy and Steve are stunned to discover Liz has spent the night with Jim. Gail demands that Nick leave Leanne alone. Deirdre is thrilled when Jon's offer on the house is accepted.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec tells the Duckworths the time has come to get rid of Betty. Fiona is pleased when she hears Jim and Liz are back together. Chris wants to tell Kevin about him and Sally

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a council clerk, Barnaby and Jones discover he was an expert blackmailer. A phone number on the dead man's blotter sends the duo to the seaside in search of his latest targets - whose boat trip could conceal a motive for the killing. Meanwhile, Joyce is convinced a local farmer knows more than he is telling. Julia McKenzie and Grant Masters guest star, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Des withdraws his cooperation from the police just as Jay thinks they have what they need to convict him of all the murders. Instead, he begins confiding in Brian, leaving Jay faced with the challenge of having to deal with a criminal biographer for the first time in his career. Des's sessions with Brian give him the chance to analyse his own behaviour, leading him to make the shocking decision to plead not guilty in court

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet reopens the investigation into the murder of childhood friend Veronica, Rachel receives news that makes her personal life even more complicated, and a teenage murderer is successfully charged, but horrific events start to unravel following his arrest. Crime drama, guest starring Sally Lindsay, with Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A kidnapper demands a ransom from a supermarket magnate in return for sparing the life of a boy who has been reported missing. Frost manages to identify a likely suspect - but with no clues to go on, it looks as if throwing away the rule book may be the only way to save the child. David Jason and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid and Jean have a lively debate about the war. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy needs a partner for the annual staff dance, so Robin takes lessons from Mrs Roper. Flat-sharing comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Paula Wilcox and Brian Murphy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason thwarts a gang of safe-robbers and finds a bag of explosives in their abandoned van - but when the haul ends up in the wrong hands, it could spell disaster for Dawn's birthday party. Meanwhile, there are embarrassing consequences for Oscar when he investigates Wetherby's mysterious lunchtime disappearances. Guest starring James Gaddas, with Joe McFadden, Derek Fowlds and Rupert Ward-Lewis

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Scott threatens to tell Terry about him and Tricia. Ashley tries to convince Mandy to cancel the wedding. Viv and Sarah clash at the diner

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly tries to talk Mandy out of the wedding. Zoe tells Paddy to forget Mandy. Paddy discovers the truth about his mum's offer to Mandy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz celebrates her 40th birthday with the rest of the family. Deirdre gives Jon a large deposit for the house. Natalie attempts to play matchmaker for Chris

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve realises he has run out of ideas to stop Fiona marrying Alan. Alf is pleased to have lost some weight. Betty feels lost and alone without Billy

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Worthy amateur choir is thrown into panic when baritone Connor Simpson is killed on the eve of the prestigious regional Four Choirs competition. A birdwatcher is also murdered shortly after, and DCI Barnaby and DC Jones uncover bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships as they try to establish if there is a connection between the two cases. Peter Capaldi guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When a spate of petty thefts culminates in a series of murders at a student hostel, Miss Lemon persuades the Belgian sleuth to investigate. As ever, he receives support from Chief Inspector Japp. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Philip Jackson, Pauline Moran, Damian Lewis and Paris Jefferson

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse meets his intellectual match when a serial killer haunting the streets of Oxford keeps himself one step ahead of the law and leaves cryptic messages to goad the police. At first glance, it seems to be the work of a deranged lunatic, but the elaborate staging of the crimes suggests method in the madness - and a macabre sharing of the sleuth's passion for opera. Starring Shaun Evans, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, Sean Rigby and James Bradshaw

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Reeling from Des' change in plea, Jay and the police throw themselves into proving premeditation, hoping to show to the court he was of sound mind when he committed his crimes. As the trial begins and the defence start to tear strips off key witnesses, Jay and his team are shocked by just how flimsy their case against Nilsen seems to be. Could this seemingly open-and-shut murder investigation really be close to collapsing?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel discovers her ex-partner is the defending barrister for Georgios Stelikos, a man on trial for rape and murder, and she is horrified when the accused escapes conviction. When Stelikos is later found dead, the prime suspect is Hannah Conway, who made public death threats against him after giving evidence for the prosecution in court. Meanwhile, Janet tries to support her colleague following devastating news. Detective drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour DI Jack Frost suspects a man he arrested years before for a series of bizarre assaults on children could have returned to the area and recommenced his unsavoury activities. He tracks down the culprit, who swears he has turned over a new leaf, and decides not to charge him - a decision that shocks fellow sleuth DS Maud, whose misgivings are later justified in tragic fashion. Starring David Jason, Peter Gunn, Susannah Doyle, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Gwyneth Powell

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: After finding out at the age of 19 that the man who raised him was not his real dad, former British soldier David Smith yearns to find the biological father he has never met. After years of dreaming, he hopes to finally know what it feels like to be called 'son'. Meanwhile, Mandy Hearn, who was adopted as a baby in 1968, hopes to trace her birth mother. However, at just 13 years old when she gave birth, she is the youngest biological mother the programme has ever encountered. Presented by Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Fact-based drama starring David Tennant as notorious serial killer Dennis Nilsen. On 9 February 1983, Detective Chief Inspector Peter Jay is called to the leafy north London address of 23 Cranley Gardens, where he discovers the drains clogged with rotting human flesh and bones. But the extent of this grisly discovery only becomes apparent when the culprit returns from work. Dennis Nilsen, a meek man, freely admits to the police that it's not just one or two bodies, but as many as 15 or 16. As the police try to secure a conviction and identify the victims from scant DNA evidence, biographer Brian Masters attempts to understand why. A game of chess with 'Des' begins, and while Brian may be exhilarated by his newest subject, he's unaware what this new obsession could do to his life. Also starring Daniel Mays, Jason Watkins and Barry Ward

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Crime drama following the personal and professional lives of two detectives working for a Manchester police unit that specialises in murder cases. DC Janet Scott (Lesley Sharp) and DC Rachel Bailey (Suranne Jones) investigate the case of a pregnant woman who was killed in her bedroom. Meanwhile, Rachel's love life takes a turn for the worse and Janet gets a call that reawakens a past tragedy. Also starring Rupert Graves, Amelia Bullmore and Nicholas Gleaves

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A student is attacked on campus, and Jack takes time off from questioning two robbery suspects to catch the thug responsible before he can strike again. The trail leads him to Boxborough - where a confrontation with a belligerent solicitor provides the clue he needs to crack the case. Starring David Jason, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons, Charlotte Bellamy and Tazmin Malleson

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike attempts to earn some cash without Sid's interference. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.desc: Les panics when he wins big on the races but cannot find the ticket. Deirdre and Jon look for a house to buy. Nick and Leanne meet in secret

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Les spreads the news that Ken is a pervert. Liz is not happy about her 40th birthday approaching. Kevin is not keen when Natalie invites him to a dinner party with her friends

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The police dig up Kim's garden looking for the money. Mandy tells Butch he has to smarten himself up for the wedding. Terry and Alan have a showdown in the pub

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy confronts Mandy about the wedding. Kim visits Steve at the remand centre. Butch enlists Biff's help to change his image. Chelsea continues bullying Robert at school

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A disgruntled client falls under suspicion when an insurance salesman is found murdered, but the victim's complicated private life gives Mason a lot to think about before the case is solved. Alf Ventress makes himself at home in the Aidensfield Arms while his house undergoes repairs, and soon overstays his welcome, while a drunk locked up in the cells for a night turns out to be a war hero friend of Sgt Miller fallen on hard times

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid returns home from work to be greeted with Sally's shocking news. Family comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: The girls find it tough sharing with one man, but their problems double once Robin's friend Larry moves in. Comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's hopes for a night of romance are dashed when Chrissy decides to supervise his girlfriend's visit. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: As the sole witness to a dying man's last words, Bobby Attfield is determined to solve the riddle they present, and forms an unlikely alliance with socialite Frankie Derwent and visiting family friend Miss Marple to help him on his quest. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage, where they uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery and deceit among its strange inhabitants. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with a supporting cast that includes Sean Biggerstaff, Samantha Bond, Richard Briers, Rafe Spall, Warren Clarke, Mark Williams, Georgia Moffett, Helen Lederer and Rik Mayall

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Nokes arrives to take charge after a lorry driver is savagely beaten and his consignment of condemned meat is stolen on the way to the incinerator, causing a health alert in Aidensfield. Peggy gets involved when she is asked to house-sit Mrs Grant's mansion and takes advantage of the opportunity to run a makshift B&B, only to find herself under arrest for handling stolen goods

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chelsea is excluded from school. Chris pays Steve a surprise visit. Kathy discharges herself from hospital. Kim's deal falls through because of Steve's reputation

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon thinks there is an intruder at the diner. Butch is distraught when Mandy invites Zak and Lisa to his romantic dinner. Laura is pleased her evening with Chris went well

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Andy and Steve are stunned to discover Liz has spent the night with Jim. Gail demands that Nick leave Leanne alone. Deirdre is thrilled when Jon's offer on the house is accepted.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alec tells the Duckworths the time has come to get rid of Betty. Fiona is pleased when she hears Jim and Liz are back together. Chris wants to tell Kevin about him and Sally

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a council clerk, Barnaby and Jones discover he was an expert blackmailer. A phone number on the dead man's blotter sends the duo to the seaside in search of his latest targets - whose boat trip could conceal a motive for the killing. Meanwhile, Joyce is convinced a local farmer knows more than he is telling. Julia McKenzie and Grant Masters guest star, with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Des withdraws his cooperation from the police just as Jay thinks they have what they need to convict him of all the murders. Instead, he begins confiding in Brian, leaving Jay faced with the challenge of having to deal with a criminal biographer for the first time in his career. Des's sessions with Brian give him the chance to analyse his own behaviour, leading him to make the shocking decision to plead not guilty in court

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet reopens the investigation into the murder of childhood friend Veronica, Rachel receives news that makes her personal life even more complicated, and a teenage murderer is successfully charged, but horrific events start to unravel following his arrest. Crime drama, guest starring Sally Lindsay, with Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A kidnapper demands a ransom from a supermarket magnate in return for sparing the life of a boy who has been reported missing. Frost manages to identify a likely suspect - but with no clues to go on, it looks as if throwing away the rule book may be the only way to save the child. David Jason and Bruce Alexander star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When the sleuth's dentist is found dead just minutes after he leaves his surgery, Chief Inspector Japp believes it to be suicide - but Poirot has reason to think otherwise and embarks on his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Mason thwarts a gang of safe-robbers and finds a bag of explosives in their abandoned van - but when the haul ends up in the wrong hands, it could spell disaster for Dawn's birthday party. Meanwhile, there are embarrassing consequences for Oscar when he investigates Wetherby's mysterious lunchtime disappearances. Guest starring James Gaddas, with Joe McFadden, Derek Fowlds and Rupert Ward-Lewis

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Scott threatens to tell Terry about him and Tricia. Ashley tries to convince Mandy to cancel the wedding. Viv and Sarah clash at the diner

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly tries to talk Mandy out of the wedding. Zoe tells Paddy to forget Mandy. Paddy discovers the truth about his mum's offer to Mandy

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liz celebrates her 40th birthday with the rest of the family. Deirdre gives Jon a large deposit for the house. Natalie attempts to play matchmaker for Chris

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve realises he has run out of ideas to stop Fiona marrying Alan. Alf is pleased to have lost some weight. Betty feels lost and alone without Billy

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Midsomer Worthy amateur choir is thrown into panic when baritone Connor Simpson is killed on the eve of the prestigious regional Four Choirs competition. A birdwatcher is also murdered shortly after, and DCI Barnaby and DC Jones uncover bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships as they try to establish if there is a connection between the two cases. Peter Capaldi guest stars

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: When a spate of petty thefts culminates in a series of murders at a student hostel, Miss Lemon persuades the Belgian sleuth to investigate. As ever, he receives support from Chief Inspector Japp. Mystery, starring David Suchet, with Philip Jackson, Pauline Moran, Damian Lewis and Paris Jefferson

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Morse meets his intellectual match when a serial killer haunting the streets of Oxford keeps himself one step ahead of the law and leaves cryptic messages to goad the police. At first glance, it seems to be the work of a deranged lunatic, but the elaborate staging of the crimes suggests method in the madness - and a macabre sharing of the sleuth's passion for opera. Starring Shaun Evans, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, Sean Rigby and James Bradshaw

programme.title: Des
programme.desc: Reeling from Des' change in plea, Jay and the police throw themselves into proving premeditation, hoping to show to the court he was of sound mind when he committed his crimes. As the trial begins and the defence start to tear strips off key witnesses, Jay and his team are shocked by just how flimsy their case against Nilsen seems to be. Could this seemingly open-and-shut murder investigation really be close to collapsing?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel discovers her ex-partner is the defending barrister for Georgios Stelikos, a man on trial for rape and murder, and she is horrified when the accused escapes conviction. When Stelikos is later found dead, the prime suspect is Hannah Conway, who made public death threats against him after giving evidence for the prosecution in court. Meanwhile, Janet tries to support her colleague following devastating news. Detective drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Dour DI Jack Frost suspects a man he arrested years before for a series of bizarre assaults on children could have returned to the area and recommenced his unsavoury activities. He tracks down the culprit, who swears he has turned over a new leaf, and decides not to charge him - a decision that shocks fellow sleuth DS Maud, whose misgivings are later justified in tragic fashion. Starring David Jason, Peter Gunn, Susannah Doyle, Bruce Alexander, John Lyons and Gwyneth Powell

programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar is asked by the former king of Fedyra to accompany him on an important mission in Switzerland, where he becomes aide to a queen

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. He disapproves of his daughter's villainous boyfriend, and Regan suspects he is being exploited to help break the romantic union. However, an even darker plan is being hatched, with the daughter an innocent pawn in a robbery. Kenny Lynch and Derek Francis guest star, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: A home for retired clowns is not all smiles and cream pies as Steed and Tara King look into the killing of the Directors of the Capitol Land and Development Company. John Cleese and Bernard Cribbins guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a hot-air balloon and attempts to break into aerial advertising. However, he is later abducted by a psychotic business rival who takes him to a disused power station, leaving Ray with the puzzle of how to track him down. George Cole and Gary Webster star

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie works alongside an old friend who once saved his life while serving in the SAS, and has difficulty coping with mounting evidence that his ex-colleague has joined the gang of Italian terrorists they are shadowing. Crime drama, starring Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar visits Venice to save a damsel in distress - only to find himself plunged headlong into a seedy underworld of gangsters, intrigue and deadly revenge. Roger Moore plays the suave secret agent, with William Sylvester, Patrick Troughton and Lois Maxwell

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A missing small-time crook turns up dead, leading to a murder investigation - but Carter's girlfriend develops a peculiar interest in the proceedings. Geraldine James guest stars, with Dennis Waterman and John Thaw

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Steed suspects that visitor Colonel Nsonga has stolen 3,000 rifles for a revolution in his country. A mercenary called Adriana is behind it, with the aim of selling them to the highest bidder. However, Tara ends up being used for target practice

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur becomes a rebel without a clue by launching a motorbike despatch agency - but Ray is concerned the entire venture is heading for a crash. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. As the investigation proceeds, the duo discover the illicit operation is being run by a country squire in his stately home. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Live Snooker: Players Championship
programme.desc: Coverage of day one of the ranking tournament, featuring two first-round matches, played over the best of 11 frames at Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes. The top 16 snooker players on the one-year ranking list are set to feature and the list is headed by world number one Judd Trump, who defends the title he won so convincingly last season, beating current Masters champion Yan Bingtao 10-4 in the final.Presented by Jill Douglas, with analysis from Stephen Hendry, Alan McManus, Ken Doherty, Neal Foulds and Rob Walker, and commentary by David Hendon and Phil Yates

programme.title: Rush Hour 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The two mismatched detectives travel to Hong Kong when terrorists bomb the US embassy, and are soon involved in keeping tabs on the prime suspects - high-ranking Triad members involved in an international counterfeiting ring. Action comedy sequel, starring Jackie Chan, Chris Tucker, John Lone, Zhang Ziyi, Roselyn Sanchez and Harris Yulin

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Lockdown Britain is enduring the sharpest economic nosedive for 300 years, with jobs and companies disappearing fast, government debt spiralling, and the Bank of England printing hundreds of billions of pounds to help make ends meet. Reporter Liam Halligan investigates the economic costs of the pandemic and what it could mean for our futures, revealing new figures on the scale of the damage and the shocking levels of joblessness the nation may soon face. He investigates the hard choices confronting the Chancellor and Prime Minister in the March Budget and the impact they could have on everyone. Will they gamble and borrow even more, hoping to boost jobs and generate economic growth to pay the Covid bill, or take the UK into austerity, with tax rises and spending cuts? As Halligan reveals, both options are fraught with danger

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver returns to demonstrate more recipes for simple, affordable and delicious meals, from quick and tasty dinners to useful staples to add to regular repertoires. He begins reinventing the roast chicken by combining it with the margherita pizza, and takes inspiration from one of his family's favourite takeaway dishes to create a prawn-toast toastie served with sweet chilli sauce and a quick cucumber pickle

programme.title: Undercover Police: Hunting Paedophiles
programme.desc: Following an officer who assumes a new identity as Oli, a gay 14-year-old boy from Bedfordshire seeking to explore his newfound sexuality on social media platforms. Before long he is contacted by a number of adult men, some of whom continue engaging with him even when he reveals to them that he is a child. As the conversations quickly turn sexual, the team behind the undercover officer race to identify the app users who are trying to arrange to sexually abuse 'Oli'

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Documentary about Thames Valley Police's investigation into the disappearance of 31-year-old mother of three Natalie Hemming on May 1, 2016. The programme has access to officers as they try to work out whether Natalie is alive or dead, and to her family and friends, struggling with the situation unfolding around them, before an arrest is made and the case reaches its conclusion

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect returns with a fresh selection of ingenious and eccentric builds created by pioneering small-space designers around the UK. Throughout the series George also travels through Japan, where ground-breaking design and innovation blend seamlessly. To begin George visits a canal boat conversion in Dudley, a cattle trailer in Yorkshire being turned into a luxury holiday camper and - in Japan - a dynamic, multi-coloured open-plan space. He and right-hand man Will Hardie also get their heads together to build their own four-ton treehouse

programme.title: The Supervet

What appears straightforward quickly turns into a much bigger concern, and Noel and his team are challenged to invent not one but two new implants for her. Meanwhile, a rescue black Labrador called Moogi is in need of treatment for severe elbow arthritis, and a golden Labrador born with a deformed front paw is offered a bionic solution in the form of a unique, custom-made prosthesis

programme.title: Fargo

Meanwhile back in 2010, Gloria decides to revisit her stepfather's past as she investigates the strange circumstances surrounding his murder, and heads to Los Angeles in an attempt to find some answers. Black comedy drama, starring Carrie Coon, with Francis Fisher

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. This time, Sandi is joined by the comedian, broadcaster and her friend Sindhu Vee to explore some of the best staycations Scotland has to offer. First, the pair visit a private island off the coast of Skye, before checking into a luxury shooting lodge in the Highlands. programme.title: Escape to the Wild

As he attempts to understand their motivations for the move, he suffers from the heat, is attacked by swarms of biting insects and shares his mud hut with a large scorpion, but begins to appreciate the rewards of a simple jungle life, one in which they've constructed a two-storey building entirely from recycled rubbish

After seeing the country's lagoons and hot geysers in daytime, Jane settles down on the deck at night to witness the Aurora Borealis, better known as the Northern Lights. programme.desc: The singer travels in the Amadara along the world's 12th longest river, the Mekong. In Vietnam, Jane explores the endless markets of Ho Chi Minh City, negotiating the numerous mopeds that make crossing the road a nerve-jangling experience. At Tan Chau, the Mekong crosses into Cambodia, for years off limits to all but the most adventurous explorers. However, the country is now embracing its potential as a tourist spot, revealing a land of historic temples, stunning vistas and gorgeous food. Jane takes an excursion to the temple of Angkor Wat, one of the oldest religious monuments on Earth

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: A stunning journey in New Zealand, through the heart of South Island's best scenery. It starts in Greymouth, renowned for its coal mining past, moving on to Arthur's Pass National Park - with its historically important Maori hunting grounds. The train passes through Cass, made famous by Kiwi artist Rita Angus and onwards to the Waimakiriri gorge and its 15 tunnels and four viaducts. Rail engineers recall how the line has been affected by earthquakes before the journey arrives in Christchurch, a city sitting on a volcano. Narrated by Bill Nighy

programme.title: Murder in a Small Town
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary examining the case against Luke Mitchell, who was accused of brutally murdering 14-year-old schoolgirl Jodi Jones in 2003. 17 years on from her murder, two former detectives who are now private investigators re-open the case files and re-examine the police and prosecution's case against Luke Mitchell, who continues to maintain his innocence to this day. Throughout the programme, the investigators uncover shocking details of other male DNA found at the crime scene, and disturbing new information from a witness living in the area at the time

programme.desc: An American naval reserve pilot is called up for service in the Korean War, and must leave his family and civilian job as a lawyer. In command of a corps of naval pilots, he heads a bombing campaign on strategic Communist positions, but later comes to question the morality of the conflict. Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

programme.title: Gun Fury (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and his fiancee take the stagecoach to California, where they intend to start a new life in the wake of the Civil War. However, during the journey an ex-Confederate outlaw and his gang of thugs attack the coach and kidnap the bride-to-be. Distraught and wounded, the rancher sets out to rescue her and punish her abductors. Western, with Rock Hudson, Donna Reed, Lee Marvin and Phil Carey

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Red Sparrow (2018)
programme.desc: Ballerina Dominika Egorova is recruited to a Russian intelligence service, where she is forced to use her body as a weapon. Her first mission, targeting a CIA agent, threatens to unravel the security of both nations. Spy thriller, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Joel Edgerton and Matthias Schoenaerts

programme.title: Action Point (2018)
programme.desc: DC is the owner of an amusement park where the rides are designed with minimum safety. He has to juggle the arrival of his estranged daughter, Boogie, with a major theme park opening nearby which threatens his business. Comedy based on a true story, starring Johnny Knoxville and Eleanor Worthington-Cox

programme.title: Amanda (2018)
programme.desc: A young man takes on the responsibility of raising his seven-year-old niece Amanda, after his sister is killed in a terrorist attack on Paris. Mikhaël Hers's drama, starring Vincent Lacoste and Isaure Multrier. In French, with English subtitles

programme.title: The Court-Martial of Billy Mitchell (1955)
programme.desc: In the 1920s, an American colonel accuses the war department of criminal negligence for denying the air force the funding it needs - but the powers-that-be still regard aircraft as an irrelevant part of the military, and respond by putting him on trial. Courtroom drama, starring Gary Cooper and Rod Steiger, with Ralph Bellamy and Elizabeth Montgomery

programme.title: Tora! Tora! Tora! (1970)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama recounting the bombing of Pearl Harbour from both the Japanese and American perspectives, reconstructing the events leading up to the devastating attack on the US naval base in 1941. Starring Martin Balsam, So Yamamura, Joseph Cotten, James Whitmore and Jason Robards

programme.title: The Cassandra Crossing (1976)
programme.desc: A fleeing terrorist infects transcontinental rail passengers with a deadly virus - prompting the authorities to consider re-routing the train across a dangerously unstable bridge, hoping it will collapse and kill everyone on board to prevent the contagion spreading. Disaster epic, starring Burt Lancaster, Richard Harris, Martin Sheen and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Now You See Me 2 (2016)
programme.desc: A gang of magicians-turned-criminals is reunited for a comeback performance by a ruthless technology magnate, whose actual goal is to force the team into carrying out a seemingly impossible heist on his behalf. The illusionists realise their only hope of avoiding the law is to perform one last unprecedented stunt to expose the businessman's illegal activities. Crime thriller sequel, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Daniel Radcliffe and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Shallow Grave (1994)
programme.desc: Three flat-sharing friends rent out their spare room to an enigmatic stranger, who promptly dies of an overdose, leaving behind a suitcase crammed full of cash. They plot to dispose of the body and keep the money - but as a curious detective comes looking for the dead man, the flatmates turn on one another. Danny Boyle's thriller, starring Ewan McGregor, Christopher Eccleston and Kerry Fox

programme.title: Trainspotting (1996)
programme.desc: A heroin addict makes a series of attempts to kick the habit, but the grind of everyday life and a circle of similarly self-destructive friends keep dragging him back to his old ways. Following a near-fatal overdose, he comes to the realisation that the only way to put his life in order is to rid himself of his friends - which is easier said than done. Danny Boyle's drama based on Irvine Welsh's novel, starring Ewan McGregor, Robert Carlyle and Ewen Bremner

programme.title: The Acid House (1997)
programme.desc: Anthology of three gritty tales based on stories by Trainspotting author Irvine Welsh. The Granton Star Cause follows a loser who meets a vengeful version of God, A Soft Touch sees a man married to a pregnant woman unable to recall the identity of her baby's father, and The Acid House tells of a drug addict trapped in an infant's body. Drama, starring Stephen McCole, Kevin McKidd, Michelle Gomez and Ewen Bremner

programme.title: Apache Drums (1951)
programme.desc: A gunslinging gambler is thrown out of an isolated frontier town for his improper behaviour. He returns to warn the unsuspecting settlers of an impending attack by a band of Apaches fighting to regain possession of their lost territory - but struggles to convince them of the danger. Western, starring Stephen McNally, Willard Parker, Coleen Gray and Arthur Shields

programme.title: Sea of Sand (1958)
programme.desc: Allied troops fighting in North Africa in 1943 are redeployed as saboteurs behind enemy lines to blow up Rommel's desert fuel dumps. A clash of personalities between officers initially causes problems, but the men overcome their differences to work together. Second World War adventure, starring Richard Attenborough, John Gregson, Michael Craig and Vincent Ball

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave

programme.title: Gunpoint (1966)
programme.desc: A sheriff tries to stop a train robbery, but is shot by his own treacherous deputy. Recovering from his wounds, he assembles a posse to bring the outlaws to justice, acquiring an uneasy ally in a saloon owner in love with a dancehall singer the fugitives have taken hostage. Western, starring Audie Murphy and Joan Stanley

programme.title: The Second Best Exotic Marigold Hotel (2015)
programme.desc: With the original Best Exotic Marigold Hotel a roaring success, owner Sonny decides the time is right to expand his business empire. But to do so, he and the rest of the residents must pull out all the stops to impress a potential investor's inspector - a task that proves to be easier said than done. Comedy drama sequel, with Dev Patel, Maggie Smith, Judi Dench and Richard Gere

programme.title: Valkyrie (2008)
programme.desc: Fact-based thriller, recreating the 1944 plot to assassinate Adolf Hitler using a briefcase bomb. As the tide of the Second World War turns in favour of the Allies, a group of senior German officers recruits war hero Colonel Claus von Stauffenberg to spearhead an attempt on the Fuehrer's life. Starring Tom Cruise, Kenneth Branagh, Bill Nighy and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: All The Money in the World (2017)
programme.desc: When 16-year-old John Paul Getty III is kidnapped in 1973, his devoted mother tries to convince his billionaire grandfather Jean Paul Getty to pay the ransom. Ridley Scott's fact-based drama, starring Michelle Williams, an Oscar-nominated Christopher Plummer, who replaced Kevin Spacey a few weeks before the film was released, and Mark Wahlberg

programme.title: Venus (2006)
programme.desc: The life of an elderly actor is turned upside down when the great-niece of his friend and fellow veteran thespian comes to stay. An unlikely but lively friendship between the elderly man and the brash young woman develops as they explore the sights of London together. Comedy, starring Peter O'Toole, Leslie Phillips and Jodie Whittaker

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character

programme.title: Junior Bake Off
programme.desc: The stakes couldn't be higher as the last remaining bakers must prepare multiple bakes for a tea party in the final. In their first and last ever Signature Challenge, they face a double challenge, juggling both iced buns and 'inside-out' biscuits at the same time. In their final and most important bake, the four finalists have their last chance to impress in the form of the ultimate Showstopper - a cake in the form of a Junior Bake Off winner's trophy. Hosted by Harry Hill

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Lois's workmates decide she needs a makeover - resulting in unexpected attention from Hal. Meanwhile, Francis learns the art of rat-catching and Hal plays basketball against the boys, but fakes an injury when he discovers how good they are. Quirky comedy, starring Jane Kaczmarek and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Part one of two. The works picnic proves tricky for the whole family as Hal tries to avoid his new boss, a girl ties Malcolm in knots, and Lois clashes with an obnoxious woman. Quirky comedy, guest starring a host of celebrities including Susan Sarandon, Magic Johnson, Heidi Klum and Christina Ricci

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica's boyfriend dumps her, Beverly finds a handsome new date to take her daughter to a party. Meanwhile, Barry becomes addicted to an arcade video game and will stop at nothing to get the money to play it

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray coaches Barry for his first high school wrestling match but keeps it a secret from Beverly, who is sure to disapprove of her son taking part in such a dangerous sport. Adam blackmails Erica into waiting in line with him to buy tickets for the new Stars Wars movie

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a fire destroys Boyle's food truck, Pimento unexpectedly shows up at the scene, working as an insurance investigator. Diaz helps Santiago to see that it's fine to get excited about picking her wedding dress, while Gina and Jeffords coach Captain Holt in the art of social media. Comedy, starring Joe Lo Truglio and Jason Mantzoukas

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle organises an elaborate scavenger hunt for Peralta's bachelor party, but the guys take some short cuts that throw the event into disarray. Santiago's bachelorette party goes awry when it comes to light that she once slept with a member of the band that is to play at her wedding reception

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After the repairs are completed in Amy's flat, she lies to Sheldon by telling him that the work is still ongoing so they can carry on living together for a while longer. Leonard is upset when he finds out Penny has been moving his collectibles out of Sheldon's old room and into storage behind his back

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam breaks his arm and tells his school friends he fell off a hoverboard like the hero in Back to the Future, but the lie threatens his friendship with Emmy Mirsky. Meanwhile, Beverly fears she's being replaced in the kitchen when the family falls in love with the new Chinese restaurant in town. An 11-year old boy captures his family on his video camera as they grow up in the 1980s. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is excited when a model scout approaches him, but Erica thinks it's a scam. With the new year around the corner, Adam tries to get Murray to build some bridges with his own father, Pop Pop. Paul Sorvino guest stars.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz work and rework a crime scene in their efforts to solve a difficult murder case that is clouded by confusing evidence. However, their sympathy for the mourning mother of the victim leads them to make unrealistic promises to her

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Captain Holt clash over the merits of Holt's newly hired assistant. Jeffords, Santiago, Diaz and Boyle attempt to do something about the cluttered and dirty communal office space at the 99th precinct

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The final week of the experiment finds the couples continuing to embark on their final dates - will their bonds continue to flourish?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows he'll have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: American reality show following the lives of chef Ben Robinson and eight crew members aboard a superyacht during a charter season around the Greek Islands

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples prepare for one last dinner party before they all go their separate ways to deliberate on their final vows, but tension continues to surround one pairing

programme.title: Teen First Dates
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix welcomes young people aged between 16 and 19 to a restaurant in Manchester, where the teenagers go on blind dates. In the first edition, flamboyant art student Archie seeks a muse, and his love of camp culture hits all the right notes with 19-year-old musician Eden

programme.title: Pete & Sam's Reality News
programme.desc: Pete Wicks and Sam Thompson deliver all the gossip from the world of reality TV, including breaking news and segments from up-and-coming comedic and presenting talent

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Portillo's Hidden History of Britain, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Spice World: The Movie, Love in the Countryside and Britain's Got Talent are among the programmes receiving a grilling from the sharp-eyed armchair critics. First aired in May 2018

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: Following six more famous faces as they join an exclusive dating agency in a bid to find true love, with the first edition seeing them attend their first mixer

programme.title: Teen First Dates
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix welcomes young people aged between 16 and 19 to a restaurant in Manchester, where the teenagers go on blind dates. In the first edition, flamboyant art student Archie seeks a muse, and his love of camp culture hits all the right notes with 19-year-old musician Eden

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: Spike, Gunn and Angel hunt for Lindsey in the hope he has information on the Senior Partners' plans and find him in a strange hell-like dimension, prompting one member of the team to make a huge sacrifice. David Boreanaz stars, with J August Richards and James Marsters

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie attend the regional hospitality awards, while Moira does everything in her power to prevent Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret. Comedy, starring Eugene Levy

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Australian-born Adam plans a 1980s Aussie soap-themed wedding in South Shields, despite the wishes of his fiancee Rachel, who dreams of a classy, sophisticated ceremony

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
