programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The Johnsons go to Jack and Diane's school play about Columbus Day, bu Dre is dismayed by the historically inaccurate way that it is portrayed. Feeling there aren't enough black holidays, he enlists singer Aloe Blacc at work to help him create a catchy song to raise awareness of Juneteenth - which commemorates the abolition of slavery in America. Comedy, starring Anthony Anderson, Tracee Ellis Ross and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante, and learns that she is suffering from post-natal depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side as she works through it. Meanwhile, the kids make an effort to assist their parents by baby-proofing the house. Comedy, starring Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Part two of two. The company picnic causes chaos for the family as Malcolm humiliates himself further and Hal cannot face admitting his real identity to his boss. Meanwhile, Francis regrets his bet against the loggers' hockey team and Reese bonds with his scavenger-hunt partner. Guest starring Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Reese's first driving lesson takes a dangerous turn, while Francis haggles his way out of debt. Offbeat comedy, starring Justin Berfield and Christopher Kennedy Masterson

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray gets his moment in the spotlight when he is honoured by his old high school for his basketball prowess. While he and Beverly are away from home, Barry takes advantage of their absence to throw a party to impress his school friends

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members worry about Diaz when she responds to an active shooter alert, but are instructed to stay back at the precinct building and are powerless to help. Peralta and Boyle try to find ways to assist Diaz, Jeffords has an existential crisis, while Santiago and Gina attempt to repair the broken toilet in the ladies' room

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Diaz and Santiago team up to take down a ruthless killer who has managed to elude them for seven years. Jeffords helps Peralta to tackle the chores on his wedding planning list. Captain Holt and his rival Olivia Crawford try to convince each other to step down from the campaign to become Police Commissioner

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the school dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey, but Beverly comes up with a candidate who surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops get into a huge argument. Allie Grant (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago investigate a difficult 'he said, she said' case. Captain Holt becomes suspicious that a cunning escape from jail has taken place after discovering that his lifelong criminal arch-nemesis has died in a prison transport accident

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta helps Santiago to navigate the complicated relationship that she has with her brother David. Boyle introduces some drama into an undercover mission involving Jeffords and Captain Holt

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples prepare for one last dinner party before they all go their separate ways to deliberate on their final vows, but tension continues to surround one pairing

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The remaining couples have been through the trials and tribulations of the experiment and now face the ultimate test of their relationship - the final vows

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the panel show, with Rob Beckett, Katherine Ryan, Richard Osman, Tom Allen, Sophie Hermann and Sophie Duker discussing popular talking points

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and Vincent Kartheiser

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people in the past. Meanwhile, Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Dre brings everyone together for a rowdy family game night and the competition is fierce. As the evening progresses, alliances are formed and some are pushed to their limits. Meanwhile, Rainbow makes it clear how she feels about Andre Jr's girlfriend

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Dewey helps Hal overcome his fear of kites, Malcolm reveals Cynthia's big secret, and Francis finds a totem pole unusually interesting. Comedy, starring Frankie Muniz and Erik Per Sullivan

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Francis brings his new wife home, while the rest of the boys get fed up with Lois shouting at them and decide to fly the nest. Comedy, starring Christopher Kennedy Masterson and Jane Kaczmarek

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad springs into action when Jake and Amy's wedding is jeopardised by a major threat. Holt is reluctant to open the email saying whether he has been appointed Commissioner

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago go on their luxury honeymoon - only to run into a familiar face. Gina and Boyle get into a family squabble and Jeffords tries to live up to his new nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents' impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam passes on a family ring to convey his feelings for Dana, Beverly has difficulty accepting her son has such deep emotions at his tender age. Problems ensue when Lainey and Barry convince Murray to watch American football with Lainey's father. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, she and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van to get back at him. Meanwhile, when Adam objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook, he gets a suspension

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A visitor from Latvia causes Boyle and Peralta to begin investigating Nikolaj's family. Captain Holt and Santiago bring in famed forensic scientist Dr Yee to help close a difficult murder case for Diaz

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The remaining couples have been through the trials and tribulations of the experiment and now face the ultimate test of their relationship - the final vows

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates' agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples say their final vows - but with their relationship in turmoil, will they go through with it?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on My Next Guest Needs No Introduction with David Letterman and Kim Kardashian, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, the Good Morning Britain interview with Nigel Farage, Strictly Come Dancing, Don't Rock the Boat, The Undoing and BBC News coverage of Covid-19, the English lockdown and the death of Sean Connery

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sharp-eyed armchair critics share their opinions on coverage of Prince Harry's wedding, All Round to Mrs Brown's, The Andrew Marr Show, A Very English Scandal, The Handmaid's Tale and Jamie's Quick & Easy Food. First shown in May 2018

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Ruby gets scammed and Dre begins to suspect that she isn't as sharp as she used to be, particularly because she was the one who used to scam other people in the past. Meanwhile, Zoey's friend Aaron visits and Diane develops an instant crush on him

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Berkshire charity worker Lynda Feymor has travelled all over the world, but it's Portugal's Eastern Algarve that's captured her heart. With a budget of £175,000, Jasmine Harman scours every nook and cranny of the local market to find five properties, but can any of them give Lynda the 'feeling' she is searching for?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus give their wedding barn a last-minute makeover as they prepare to host their first official booking: a steampunk-themed wedding vow renewal. Expectant parents Amy and Marc battle brambles and needlework to turn the grounds of their medieval chateau into an escapist retreat for their first guided meditation practice. Meanwhile, near the Loire Valley, chateau owners Ben and Billie make the most of their riverside location by building a floating pontoon as part of their plans for a bijou glamping site

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Morag and Heiko Buxel with their continental kit-build home in Stirlingshire. They expect it to take just six weeks to erect their prefabricated family home on the outskirts of their village, but with speed comes pressure as every detail needs to be decided in advance. The couple have an early setback and their summer project becomes a winter struggle. The weather renders the site almost inaccessible as the whole build gets stuck in the mud

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and her friend Anny Harrison host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire. Chris Witton and Saroop Ram from the Swan Hotel feel right at home, but tech-savvy Colin and Ben Warburg from Scalford Hall Hotel fail to connect from the start. During the afternoon's hay-bale race, youngsters Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker from the Abbey Hotel fail to stack up to the challenge. At dinner, Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. Colin's feedback leaves unanswered questions for Mandy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Witton and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that straightforward value for money will win them the competition, as they host at the Swan Hotel in Telford. A Yorkshire pudding-making competition leaves confident cooks Mandy and Anny thinking there's more to youngsters Charlie and Lauren than meets the eye. At dinner, Rammy opens up about his troubled past. Colin has a rude awakening in the morning. At feedback time, Chris has a change of heart about some of his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin Warburg and his student son Ben hope that their 81-room country pile - Scalford Hall Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire - will wow their rivals. However, Chris and Rammy are still smarting from their feedback and think that Colin is playing games. After an afternoon crate stacking competition on the hotel's high wire course, Colin gets a grilling at dinner. A lukewarm reaction to breakfast only adds to Colin's woes and when he sees his feedback he suspects that retribution is at hand

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by confident young colleagues Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker. However when Charlie and Lauren's guests arrive, Colin and Ben feel the squeeze and Chris and Rammy find themselves in a sticky situation. On an afternoon at the archery range, scores are settled. At dinner, straight-talking Chris can't help but be impressed, but when the conversation turns to parking, the guests are in a jam with their hosts. Later, Colin's feedback leaves Lauren wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to settle some scores. Laskill Country House host Mandy wants to crack where she went wrong with breakfast and why Colin and Ben failed to connect with her, while Chris and Rammy from The Swan Hotel wish to question Lauren on her room flaws and get to the bottom of Colin's bedroom nightmares

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Jan Fursier has discovered in one of her father Reg's diaries an illustrated guide to building a 1930s caravan, drawn up while he was being held in a Japanese prisoner of war camp. George Clarke and Will Hardie attempt to bring the caravan to life, leading to an emotional reunion in the same Welsh national park where Reg took the family on holidays once the Second World War was over

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Spider monkey Kiara becomes a mother for the first time, but keepers worry that the baby is becoming weak as Kiara appears to be more interested in playing with the other monkeys than taking on maternal responsibilities. Meanwhile, baby capybara Henry enjoys having the attention of all the female capybaras, and Babirusa Sausu moves from paddock to paddock to mate with various females

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits Denise and Bruno Del Tufo in Ashford, Kent, who hoped to transform a concrete water tower designed by Edwin Lutyens into a contemporary home. Kevin was originally far from enthusiastic about their project, believing the original building to be ugly and brutal in its design - but the couple soon had other problems to worry about, as rising steel prices forced them to make drastic changes to their budget

programme.title: Darcey Bussell's Wild Coasts of Scotland

programme.title: Scotland: My Life in the Wild

The film follows him over the course of the summer as he goes in search of images of red deer, pine martens, white-tailed sea eagles and puffins

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B battle continues at the Parsonage Hotel and Spa near York, a 55-room country manor which wows the guests with its size, although Mandi's high cleaning standards are not met

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Oaklea Barns is first, and hosts Mandi and Paul want answers from Mark and Natalie, which ends up fanning flames

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect recalls projects from Amazing Spaces, revisiting his favourite caravan builds, wilderness lodges and garden retreats. In this instalment, he considers the caravan-inspired treehouse in the Highlands of Scotland, a mirror-clad cube in Sweden and a UFO construction nestled amongst the branches. Plus, a trip to Tuscany and George's own star gazing treehouse in Kielder National Park, Northumberland

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, keepers prepare for the difficult task of transporting giraffe Kidepo to a new zoo, and Kidepo's brother Narus is not making the move any easier. Meanwhile, silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, and after diving headfirst into an empty pool one too many times, keepers decide a trip to the vet is in order for caiman lizard Gary to see if there is an underlying problem. Elsewhere, dominant warthog Magnum is being challenged by fellow warthog Dobby, so keepers decide it is time to move Dobby to a zoo in Germany

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Documentary following Dick Strawbridge and Angel Adoree through the process of buying and restoring a French chateau that has been empty for the past four decades. Their new home has 12 acres of land, nine outbuildings, a walled garden and a moat - but it also has no electricity, heating or water, and proves to be a far more complicated DIY project than expected

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud revisits a prefabricated-home project in west Cumbria to find out whether Alan and Judith Dawson are happy with the finished product. The couple employed a method of building that allowed them to assemble the property in just 15 days on a budget of £300,000, but with so much attention given to the speed of construction, there was little time to think how the house might be to live in

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge turn their attentions to the wash house - a shell of an old stone building on the far side of the moat. programme.desc: Mike uncovers a 1915 motorcycle and a valuable bear trap before falling prey to one of Frank and Danielle's pranks

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: Police crack down on the gangs that use local businesses as a front for selling drugs, executing raids on these small-time dealers in the hope of crippling the larger players

programme.title: Drug Wars
programme.desc: Police target key members of Mara Salvatrucha, one of Guatamala City's most notorious gangs, who are involved in contract killing, extortion and prostitution

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff, Chris Harris and Paddy McGuinness return with the motoring magazine, beginning by heading to Paddy's home town of Bolton to test three new company cars by spending 24 hours in them - with no getting out. Plus, Chris heads to Italy to put the Ferrari SF90 supercar through its paces

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May are challenged to create a TV advert for Volkswagen, but soon fall out as James concentrates on detailed information on fuel economy and Jeremy wants something more exciting. Richard Hammond explores an alternative to Germanic sports saloons and tests the Vauxhall VXR8 Bathurst, and former US chat show host Jay Leno is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall and Checkpoint Charlie now teems with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations, such as pureed sunflower seeds, Jerusalem artichoke flans and crushed frozen pine nuts. Loved by the likes of Greta Garbo, Charlie Chaplin and Auguste Escoffier there's still a cornucopia of choice for those with a more traditional temperament with eisbein, meatballs and sausages topping every menu in the German capital

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond visits Abu Dhabi's Yas Marina circuit to drive the Porsche 918 Spyder, a four-wheel-drive hybrid hypercar capable of astonishing speeds thanks to the 886 horsepower it can generate from its screaming V8 petrol engine and electric motors. Jeremy Clarkson and James May join forces to create a public information film to promote safer cycling, with their efforts presented to a panel of experts including members of Westminster Council and Olympic gold medal-winning rider Chris Boardman. Meanwhile, Jeremy - who has promised to change his name to Jennifer if the Porsche is faster around the test track than the McLaren P1 driven earlier in the series - compares the seventh-generation Volkswagen Golf GTI to BMW's critically acclaimed M135i. Breaking Bad star Aaron Paul fires up the Reasonably Priced Car to see what lap time he can achieve

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.desc: The chef visits Vienna, the city that once ran the Austro-Hungarian Empire and continues to be home to comfort dishes such as tafelspitz and goulash, and which gave its name to one of Europe's most popular dishes - the Wiener schnitzel. He also finds time to enjoy the traditional music of the country, typically Mozart and Strauss

programme.desc: The chef visits Bologna in northern Italy, a city so famous for its food that it's known as the stomach of Italy. programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Newbridge in Co Kildare to Roscrea, North Tipperary, visiting the Irish National Stud in Tully, discovering how harsh life was for the Irish poor and investigating an astronomical feat of Victorian engineering

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the second programme this year from RAF Coningsby in Lincolnshire, and discovers the story of a length of tree that ended up inside a Lancaster bomber. Treasures brought in to be valued include a harp that survived the French Revolution, a curious wooden item with an unexpected purpose, a diamond brooch found hidden inside a barometer and a pair of Second World War propaganda posters printed on hessian sacking

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the final leg of his journey through the Republic of Ireland, travelling from Athlone to Galway. Along the way he examines historic jewellery with royal connections, encounters a people's king and meets up with a traditional Irish singing group

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Armed with a copy of George Bradshaw's Victorian Railway Guidebook, Michael Portillo embarks on another journey around the country to discover how the railways have affected people and communities, and the legacy they have left behind. He begins in Manchester, where he finds out how the world's first industrialised city produced a revolutionary political movement, and learns about the railway workers who founded one of the most successful football clubs of all time. Along the way, the presenter does the washing in Port Sunlight - a model village on the Wirral - and hears stories about the aptly named George Francis Train's time in Birkenhead, Merseyside

programme.desc: Hairdresser Julie hosts the first of a week of dinner parties in Co Durham, hoping to win over her guests with a no-nonsense menu she can prepare in advance. Julie overcooks her beef, but will her hosting make up for it and bag her the £1,000 prize?

But having been highly critical of everyone else's food so far, will they now take the chance to get their own back or can she win them round?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final evening of gatherings in Co Durham sees IT manager David stage a French-themed soiree in the hope of securing the £1,000 prize. However, he soon finds his main challenge is to keep all his guests on friendly terms

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Down City, a restaurant in Providence, Rhode Island. The no-nonsense chef struggles to persuade hot-headed owner Abby to make his suggested changes, and a confrontation results in him being thrown out of the building in the middle of a dinner service. The eatery's co-owner and financier begs Gordon to return, but his success hinges on his ability to win Abby over

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Keen runners Richard and Eileen love sunny Cyprus so much they've been coming back for 15 years and have even booked their places on the island's annual half marathon. All they need now is their very own holiday home in their favourite town of Oroklini, where they can also entertain their 13 children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman offers his expert help, lining up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps John and Soussan search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa Calida. The pair hope to find an apartment with a pool for when their grandchildren come to visit

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: It's Garden Week in the pottery and the remaining potters face a green-fingered challenge - to build an animal water feature and throw a strawberry planter. The pressure's on to turn on the waterworks, as judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller decide who will make the quarter-finals and who will be heading home. Siobhan McSweeney hosts

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. This time, Sandi is joined by BAFTA-winning actor and writer Jessica Hynes to explore the ultimate staycations in Jessica's home county of Kent. The pair visit a lovingly restored early 1900s windmill outside the village of Benenden, before travelling to the Isle of Sheppey, where they explore Elmley National Nature Reserve, the only nature reserve in England where you can stay overnight

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A chance to catch-up with some of the best moments from this year's episodes, featuring some of the country's favourite celebrities. The line-up of famous faces critiquing the year's biggest and best shows includes Denise van Outen and her partner Eddie, Rylan-Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Gyles Brandreth and Maureen Lipman, Mo Gilligan and Babatunde Aleshe, KSI and S-X, and Shaun Ryder and Bez. The shows featured are This Morning, Planet Earth II, Big Brother: Best Shows Ever, Grease, Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back, World Cup Final '66, Dating Around and Misery

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while Brett Domino joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A beauty queen bricklayer goes looking for love with a bar manager, while two students with very different priorities when it comes to conversation try to make a connection. A financial investigator meets a man who seems to have an answer to everything, and a man whose job takes him all over the world is under pressure to find himself a wife

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 13-year-old aspiring Olympian fractures his pelvis after falling from his bike, an injury that may have devastating long-term consequences for his sporting career. As doctors determine if an operation is needed, his mother reflects on how a spinal injury brought an end to her own dreams when she was a teenager. A motorcyclist is brought in to St Georges, having been flung six feet in the air following a collision with a car

programme.title: Back
programme.desc: Stephen is dismayed when Ellen and Julian announce their engagement, while Geoff's relationship spectacularly collapses and he faces having to sell his farm and move away. Alison is angry to hear that Andrew has persuaded her parents into making a huge life decision. Black comedy, starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: It's a Sin
programme.desc: November 1991 finds the situation darkening. Jill and Roscoe work extra hours, while Ritchie clings to past success and even Carol finds a kinder side. As the final days of the old gang unravel, everyone must face up to the spectre of Aids and the prejudice and fear that walk alongside it. When Valerie goes on the warpath, terrible confrontations are made and it falls to Jill to find hope and reconciliation for Ritchie in the darkest days of their lives. The final instalment of Russell T Davies' drama, starring Olly Alexander, Keeley Hawes and Lydia West

programme.title: The Mum Who Got Tourette's
programme.desc: Elizabeth is a typical suburban housewife and mother of three with one big difference - without warning, shortly after her 40th birthday, she developed Tourette's syndrome - a neurological condition that causes involuntary tics, some of them offensive. This one-off documentary follows Elizabeth and her family over the course of a busy summer, including a holiday in Cornwall, GCSE results and meeting her son's new girlfriend - experiences amplified by the unexpected impact of Elizabeth's condition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Glencoe Villa Guesthouse in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, owned by Ewa Hunt, but the homely styled bedrooms are not to everyone's taste

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Catching up with more British expats who set up new businesses abroad, revisiting a luxury B&B in Spain as its owners launch a new sideline they hope will turn a profit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Steve and Jane from Eastbourne have been together for 16 years and now wish to buy their very first property together on the Canary Island of Tenerife. They're looking for a town house with some outside space on the northern coast, where they can enjoy holidays with their five children and perhaps relocate permanently to in the next few years. Working with a budget of £200,000, Jasmine Harman sets out to find them their dream home

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Former How Clean is Your House? presenter Kim Woodburn and her husband Pete decide they would like to take ownership of a holiday home on the Costa del Sol, so Jonnie Irwin takes them to view five penthouses that meet their £320,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Chris and Dan Boettcher from Bedfordshire find a holiday home in the Axarquia region of Spain's Costa del Sol on their budget of £70,000. They view five properties, hoping one of them will be the retreat they can escape to with their family without too much prior planning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from in and around Brighton. The first host, 47-year-old radio presenter Guy, plans a musical evening with a Mexican menu and an air guitar competition. His guests are 26-year-old recruitment company director Emma, 28-year-old pilot Tim, 38-year-old personal trainer Hannah and 50-year-old 'love doctor' Monti. Guy hosts a hilarious evening with lessons in love, surprising revelations and a dessert that doesn't go to plan

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day in and around Brighton, and bubbly 26-year-old Emma is hosting a beach-themed dinner party in the hope of winning the £1,000 cash prize. After a day of forgotten ingredients and culinary calamities, Emma has some questions up her sleeve to help her find out more about 'love doctor' Monti. Dutch pilot Tim is also feeling the love, as a bromance begins to blossom

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in and around Brighton, as Dutch pilot Tim draws on his travel experience to produce an international menu. After a turbulence-free day in the kitchen, Tim continues to charm his guests, especially DJ Guy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Hannah reveals quite a lot more about herself to her guests. There are no shortage of shocks and surprises as layer after saucy layer is peeled away from the usually quiet and reserved host, but there's sauciness of a different kind when one guest annoys the others by defiantly adding their own condiments to each of the three courses

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of competition in and around Brighton, sees 50-year-old 'love doctor' Monti try to cast his spell over his guests in an attempt to win the £1000 cash prize. While Monti tries to spread the love, Tim really puts his foot in it as his compliment to Hannah gets well and truly lost in translation

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Sheila wants a family friendly property in the thriving resort of Benalmadena on the Costa del Sol, with its sunny beaches and lively atmosphere. With a budget of £135,000 and specifying the need for sea views, Danni Menzies sets out to deliver the dream place

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps a Salisbury couple who visit Malta three times a year and hope to move there permanently to find a holiday home on the island for a budget of £160,000

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The presenter attempts to unlock the potential of old houses, including the rules when it comes to putting a kitchen in a period home. He also meets a woman who bought a 400-year-old Devon cottage, and has some solutions for turning this old house into a new home

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George Clarke checks out unusual mobile homes, including a converted railway cattle carriage and a vintage Morris Minor Caravanette in need of extensive renovation. He also begins a tour of Spain's tiny homes in the Sierra de Las Nieves mountains in southern Andalucia, and embarks on another project, as he and Will Hardie decide to transform the rusty shell of a 1970s builders' van into a luxury camper

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout (2018)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team join forces with CIA assassin August Walker to prevent a disaster caused by mysterious arms dealer John Lark and a group of terrorists known as the Apostles. However, Hunt and his colleagues are soon pushed to their limits thanks to a face from their past. Writer/director Christopher McQuarrie's sixth entry in the action thriller saga, starring Tom Cruise and Henry Cavill

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson take on Lee Mack and Katherine Ryan in the comedy words-and-numbers game, while Brett Domino joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside an A&E department, focusing on patients and their families, as well as the work of the staff dealing with the emergencies

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two couples who were searching for their first homes. In 2018 in Kettering, Claudia and Tom wanted room for their work as illustrators and for their crafting hobbies, as well as the room to start a family. Meanwhile in Leicester, Mike and Karen needed help finding a home to bring them together

programme.title: Secret Safari: Into the Wild
programme.desc: A young cheetah must protect her four cubs after they stray into lion territory. A dominant male hartebeest defends his territory and dwindling herd from predators, and one of Ol Pejeta's smallest but most important inhabitants, the cocktail ant, needs the rangers' help to fight off a full-scale invasion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to Glencoe Villa Guesthouse in Featherstone, West Yorkshire, owned by Ewa Hunt, but the homely styled bedrooms are not to everyone's taste

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at The Fox Inn in Stourton, Staffordshire, where owners Stefan Carron and Nick Edwards hope to impress their guests

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Featuring a couple in France taking their painting holiday business in a new direction, a bike hire shop in Spain, and a Somerset fitness instructor recovering from a setback

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Keen runners Richard and Eileen love sunny Cyprus so much they've been coming back for 15 years and have even booked their places on the island's annual half marathon. All they need now is their very own holiday home in their favourite town of Oroklini, where they can also entertain their 13 children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman offers his expert help, lining up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Elsa and Brian Surridge were on the verge of buying a Spanish property when the 2008 financial crisis scared them off. A decade later they're back and Brian has promised Elsa they won't leave without bagging their dream retirement property on the Costa Blanca. Jasmine Harman shows them five very different options for their cash budget of £75,000.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Angela and Michael Sidebotham from Lincolnshire are ready to fulfil their life-long dreams of buying a home in Davenport, Florida, where they plan to spend half of each year. With a budget of £160,000, Sara Damergi shows the couple five properties that meet their requirements

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chauffeur James hosts the first of five parties in Surrey, hoping his Caribbean menu can impress music tutor Caroline, hairdresser Ben, nail technician Myle and sales director John

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Myle serves up traditional Vietnamese food on the second night in Surrey, but the pressure is intensified when her mum pays a visit

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Ben hosts a Mexican fiesta for the third night of the competition in Surrey, hoping to win over his guests with a night of mariachis and pinatas

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The fourth to host in Surrey is 56-year-old music teacher Caroline, who hopes an evening of singing, dancing and nursery rhymes will increase her chances of bagging the money

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Uber-competitive businessman John is banking on his home-cooked menu to bag him the prize at the end of the night. However, John's one-upmanship and lengthy anecdotes have annoyed hairdresser Ben, who feels that he would be the smuggest contestant ever if he wins

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas shows five properties to Greater Manchester couple Sandra and Robert, who want a holiday home on Spain's Costa Blanca with plenty of storage space for their bikes and located within a short walk to the beach

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Sunderland couple Julia and Warren find a home near the picturesque town of Álora in the Andalusian countryside, on a budget of £95,000

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Law enforcement officer Nick brings a vintage Allwin penny arcade machine, and antique restorer Andy and woodturner Nick go up against each other for the opportunity to restore it

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Comedian Rob Beckett joins Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty in their cafe on Southend Pier. Rob's perfect meal out is 'duck on tap' at an all-you-can-eat Chinese buffet. He makes Peking-style roast duck, served with cucumber batons, hoisin sauce and the thinnest ever pancakes. Rob is also turned into a human NutriBullet as he attempts to break a world record. Jamie serves up a comforting chicken and mushroom pie, while Jimmy spices up Friday night snacks with his potato spirals and stuffed jalapeños wrapped in bacon. Away from the pier, the hosts are put to work at a watercress farm in Hampshire

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Professional deep-sea diver Adrian Corrigall and his wife Megan plan to build their new family home in rural East Sussex almost entirely out of concrete, with construction involving cutting-edge technologies conceived in Switzerland and never used to build a house before. However, the perils of being a pioneer soon become evident, and with both schedule and budget under strain, Adrian is forced to resume work as a diver, taking him away from the project for a month at a time

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Big Narstie's unlucky in love cousin goes on a date with an office manager whose online confidence does not extend to real life. An 83-year-old former pin-up model seeks a man who can keep up with her hectic lifestyle and loves long walks - a date with his own personal trainer may just be what she needs. A midwife hoping to have children of her own dates a former strongman, and two men with a love of dancing bond over their matching outfits

programme.title: The Undateables
programme.desc: Following three new singletons on their search for love. Nineteen-year-old royalist Sam, who is autistic, has planned his own nuptials right down to the smallest details, despite never going on a date. 22-year-old creative Jodie, who loves making her own jewellery and designing her own clothes, longs to find a partner before she will need to rely on her wheelchair in later life. Meanwhile, 29-year-old hockey player Hannah, who has a functional neurological disorder following a random seizure, is looking for a special someone to share her life with

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes with Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: The presenter explores the UK's wildest, most remote and beautifully designed holiday homes, accompanied by some of the nation's most fascinating and funny women. This time, Sandi is joined by the comedian, broadcaster and her friend Sindhu Vee to explore some of the best staycations Scotland has to offer. First, the pair visit a private island off the coast of Skye, before checking into a luxury shooting lodge in the Highlands. Finally, they arrive at a truly unique, elliptical shaped home built to celebrate the island views of the Inner Hebrides and the Sound of Mull

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back to some of their favourite properties from the show and offers tips and tricks to help viewers make the best of their homes. As well as catching up with some of the families that previously featured, Kirstie and Phil focus on the layout issues and dilemmas that many of us now face in a very different world. In this episode, the pair focus the best ways to make a budget stretch, as two families with grand renovation plans look to make their money go a long way

programme.desc: A wealthy 21-year-old with a busy social life moves in with a single mother from Orpington and her three children. She learns an important lesson in the need to become independent from her parents - and their money

programme.title: Grime and Punishment: Dirty Britain
programme.desc: David discovers a load of sex toys dumped in a farmer's field and Ray wages a one-man war on the irresponsible dog owners of Dorset. Clive and Callum face the prospect of cleaning up roadside laybys covered in human effluent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Housing officers in Harrow receive a tip-off about an overcrowded property and when they arrive they find 10 people living in dire conditions and a house that needs extensive emergency work. Squatters in Tottenham invade an elderly woman's home while she is away, ransacking the property and refusing to leave. In Waltham Abbey a seemingly perfect tenant forges her way into a desperate landlord's home, forcing him to move in with his parents while he struggles to evict his unruly occupant

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The story of landlords Pauline and Simon, who bought a property blind with tenants in situ - not realising the difficulties that would ensue. It turned out their tenants were causing havoc in the neighbourhood and had more than a hundred arrests between them for drugs and domestic violence - and if the landlords did not evict them, they themselves could be prosecuted. Plus, a Slough landlord forced to call in an eviction expert when his tenant cut off all communication

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two new officers chase a gang of youths spotted joyriding around an Essex village in a stolen car. A counsellor is called out to avert a potential suicide on the M25, and a thief's attempts to misdirect the team fall flat when damning evidence of his crimes is found in his car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team tracks three men suspected of burgling a number of plumbers' merchants, and a fleeing van causes a major accident by speeding the wrong way around a busy roundabout. Police also investigate illegally customised vehicles in Basildon, Essex, and a man threatens to battle through a street full of officers

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A stolen car is recovered on the M11, and the team is given advanced training in the use of a tactical battering ram. Plus, a suspect briefly goes missing at a burger bar, an officer proves his mettle in a series of drug raids, and members of the unit are forced to calm a drunken sailor

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement agents evict a large group of squatters barricaded into a disused nursery in London, and have to resort to smashing their way in as they refuse to leave. Meanwhile, agents in Bristol try to recover over £10,000 owed by a plumbing business to a supplier, and emotions run high when they attempt to evict a tenant who pleads her innocence in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An episode combining new and unforgettable past cases. The High Court Enforcement Agents head to Manchester to track down over £5,000-worth of debt, and seize an expensive car in the process. Later in south London, the agents deal with a violent debtor who threatens them with a concealed weapon, and in Liverpool, they are met with lies and aggression from a mechanic who owes nearly £3,000

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Jane loses Clive's keys and searches for them in a panicked frenzy, until she stumbles upon Paul, as well as the truth. Elsewhere, Nicolette decides to finally come clean

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ari confronts Dean after Bella arrives from her visit to Colby, deeply upset. Martha wants Kieran to have a job at the gym. The Parata boys are making plans

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Two more families swap homes, budgets and lifestyles for a week to see how the other half lives. For Matthew and Belinda Sethard-Wright and their two children, this means exchanging their large house in Orpington for a Bromley council house. Moving into their home will be Skye Walker and her three children. As a professional housekeeper, Skye works in houses not unlike the Sethard-Wrights'. Now she will be able to enjoy its many comforts for herself - include a swimming pool, tennis court and weekly £1,500 shopping budget

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall tries to solve more dog behavioural problems, visiting a family in East Sussex struggling with rescue puppy Diego, a Rottweiler-Rhodesian ridgeback cross. In Cambridgeshire, cocker spaniel Doug's relentless thievery is destroying any chance of a peaceful retirement for owners Julie and Mark, while Graeme's third stop is in Derby, where he meets two miniature schnauzers known locally as the Krays

programme.title: Psycho Pussies 2: Mad Cat Attacks!
programme.desc: Online clips and live case studies explore some bad feline behaviour, including those fearlessly ferocious types that think nothing of attacking their loyal owners. Owner Cath found herself hospitalised for four days after her savage cat Milo attacked her, while Deezel's owner Fiona has had to build an impenetrable wall to prevent the feline attacking three dogs. Elsewhere, aptly-named Sid Vicious is a feral punk rocker of a cat who eats six times a day. Will owner Janice ever be able to tame this animal with an attitude?

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: A super sleuth attempts to bring down a seven-and-a-half-ton fly-by-night dumper, proving that cameras never lie. And in Braintree, Essex, former military man Stu is out to blanket his entire county in hidden CCTV, in order to catch the culprits plaguing his patch

programme.title: Plus-Size Porn: Adults Only!
programme.desc: The world of supersized sex workers, women at different stages of embracing their size and moving from being labelled unattractive to billing themselves as big and beautiful. The programme follows Lisa, aka Lady Voluptua and porn stars Saskia and Vicky as they ply their trades and stake their claims for bigger women to be considered serious players in the sex industry

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Paramedic Jack attends the scene of a double stabbing in Birmingham, where two neighbours have been attacked. Plus, Ambulance Control receive an emergency call reporting a man trapped under a bus

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: The return of the documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. A patient in police custody is brought in for treatment to a split eyebrow and some facial wounds, while the resus team attempts to save the life of a patient who is rushed into hospital in cardiac arrest

programme.desc: Twenty-four-year-old Jay, who works in finance and loves splashing his cash on clothes and cars, agrees to live on the streets of London for three nights

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: The son of two millionaires moves in with a Leytonstone couple. He attempts to organise a birthday party on a budget, and is challenged by the kids on how much he does for charity

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from a year working abroad to find himself £24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own property. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. What has happened since?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: In Bristol, eviction lawyer Chris deals with a complex case in which squatters have broken into an empty pub and are now refusing to leave, with landlord Alex wanting them out as he is awaiting planning permission to turn the pub into flats. Jill is trying to regain a property she and her late husband bought as an investment, which she has been renting out to alleviate financial stress

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team is forced to intervene when a man is assaulted in the street by his wife. Officers set out on the trail of one of the largest stolen car operations in Essex, and the interceptors put their vehicles to the test when the driver of a hijacked 4x4 goes off road in an attempt to lose them

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Inspector Emma Brookes races 40 miles to prevent a suicidal man throwing himself off a rooftop, while one of her colleagues chases a suspected drug dealer. Elsewhere, the Air Support Unit is called to track a fugitive car thief, and a man is caught with a van full of stolen clothes

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Two officers make a surprising discovery while apprehending a gang of car thieves, and a team uses automatic number-plate recognition to identify stolen vehicles outside the biggest shopping centre in Essex. An air ambulance makes an emergency landing in Clacton-on-Sea, a three-car shunt brings the M25 to a halt and a policeman drops his handcuffs down a drain

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents chase almost £3,000 owed by Indian takeaway owners, but when the staff deny any knowledge of the debt, the agents threaten to seize kitchen equipment. In east London they face a race against time to recover more than £8,000 from an electrical services company, and in Cheshire the enforcement agents chase nearly £4,000 of debt owed by a mobile phone shop

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent shocks Aaron and David with his rough sleeping ordeal, and the pair search for him when he disappears. Terese is horrified when Tim Collins finds an old statement of hers

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: A furious Mac demands answers at the Parata house, thinking their plan will backfire completely. Dean visits Colby for a tear-jerking encounter

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: Documentary about the daily battles for parking spaces across Britain. In Basildon, the locals are taking up arms after being caught out on camera at a hi-tech high-street car park. Plus, the story of a 'Cornish Columbo' who turned detective when his beloved Reliant Robin was mysteriously moved onto double yellows, earning him £400 in parking tickets

programme.title: Robbing Your Relatives
programme.desc: Return of the documentary taking a look at what can happen when families fall out over money. The first episode examines the case of a teenager cheated out of her grandfather's inheritance by her own dad and stepmother. The pair forged signatures and lied to solicitors and banks to steal the money, then frittered it away on luxuries and paying off their own debts. There is also the story of a pair of identical twins who fell out over a £55,000 loan, and a man who was alleged to have robbed his mother's pension and life savings, but took his own life before justice was done

But weeks later, it was revealed that Karen had known the truth all along - in a hoax kidnapping, Shannon was being kept hidden by a man known to her mother, who had plotted to claim the £50,000 reward money for her return

The series also turns the spotlight on dishonest letting agents who have taken advantage of their position of trust to profit at the expense of both property owners and their tenants

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: An edition catching up with previous cases. Owed thousands in rent, landlord Matthew decided to evict his tenant, and called on an eviction specialist for help. As the tenant lived with seven cats, Matthew was worried about the state of the property, but that turned out to be the least of his problems. Cameras catch up with Matthew to see if he turned his property around. Having found a buyer for his house, Kirk asked the sitting tenant to leave. However, on the day of the move, she refused, stopped paying rent and Kirk's sale fell through. Kirk had to evict his nightmare tenant before he lost the house. Was he able to sell his property at least, or was he tempted to become a landlord once again?

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers conduct a 48-hour hunt for a thief who stole a 4x4, and their perseverance pays off when they manage to catch the culprit. Meanwhile, in Clacton-on-Sea, a tip-off sends the interceptors to a drug den, and the Essex chopper team co-ordinates a manhunt when three high-profile suspects evade capture by fleeing into a field full of cows

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The team is forced to don full riot gear on New Year's Eve to deal with a knife-wielding man, and unprecedented snowfall brings chaos to the roads of Essex. Meanwhile, an officer seizes a haul of mystery drugs, and the Air Support Unit lends a hand in a chase across six lanes of traffic

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Emily and Grant join forces with Ofcom to raid a pirate radio station, and Biggers and Andy track down a suspected drug runner on the M25. At a national car event, the Mitsubishi Evo 10 police vehicle proves to be popular with thousands of auto enthusiasts

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than £12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than £5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over £6,000 owed by a property developer

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers try to recover £13,000 owed by a high-performance car dealer in Birmingham, and in Wolverhampton the agents chase nearly £2,000 owed to a car hire company. Elsewhere, officers visit a family in Kent to try to collect more than £5,000, but an emotional backstory means they are forced to make a sensitive decision

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Emmett shows up to help Aaron and David with their search, much to their surprise. Nicolette takes a stand against Paul, and Yashvi grapples with her father's new relationship

programme.desc: A stranger walks into the Diner, mystifying Marilyn. Christian comes to Tori for help to hunt for somewhere to rent, until Justin offers up their family home without asking Tori

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the secret of the supermarket chain's success. The programme examines the launch of a brand of organic food from Prince Charles' own duchy and reveals how the opening of a new Waitrose store has been known to boost house prices in the surrounding area. A taste test is performed to see how Waitrose's own brands compare to their rivals

programme.title: M&S vs Waitrose: Which Is Better Value?
programme.desc: Documentary examining the ongoing rivalry between the supermarkets. Marks & Spencer has always had a special place in the nation's heart, with almost 1,000 stores and a reputation for quality stretching back 135 years. But Waitrose has proved a fierce rival. However, both stores face tough challenges in the future, not least from online retailers. Which of the two is best equipped to weather the high-street storm?

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate an attack on a nurse, and discover she had been moving house regularly in an effort to evade a stalker who terrorised her with distressing e-mails. The victim regains consciousness, but fails to identify her attacker, leading to the shocking revelation that she may have fabricated the assault story as a way of attracting attention

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the disappearance of a wealthy couple seemingly snatched from their apartment building, but suspicion eventually falls on a man suffering from mental illness - presenting Ross with a tough ethical decision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Benjamin Bratt and Carey Lowell

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. The pair learn the foreign widow married in the hope of a better life, but fell in love with a co-worker - and out of favour with her husband

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe race to find the kidnapped son of a wealthy businessman who was is arrested while trying to exchange a ransom for the boy, and now threatens to interfere with the investigation

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A tennis star is attacked in her locker room before a big tournament, and her wrist is broken during the incident. The sportswoman cannot give a description of her assailant, but the circumstances of the fray lead the detectives to suspect one of her competitors. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pedestrian is hit by a truck, and investigations reveal the victim's link to a baby-food producer with connections to the Russian Mafia. Police drama, starring Christopher Noth and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While performing an autopsy for a class of military students, Ducky discovers the cadaver he is using is the body of a murder victim. In trying to identify the corpse, Gibbs and his team are set on the trail of a career criminal specialising in identity fraud. Meanwhile, Ziva has difficulty separating her personal feelings and professional judgment. Starring David McCallum and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy Seal is shot dead while threatening to throw himself from the top of a building. An al-Qaeda operative emerges as the main suspect, but DiNozzo thinks the killer may actually be found closer to home. Elsewhere, a rumour spreads that Abby may be about to leave NCIS for good. Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette star in the American drama

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The unit is called to examine the mysterious death of a sailor serving on a research vessel engaged in a top-secret mission. The ship proves to have been abandoned by its crew, and Ducky discovers the victim died from a highly contagious virus - putting everyone presently on board at risk. Drama, starring David McCallum, Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: After a 50-year-old tape recording left by a murder victim is found, the NCIS team tries to exonerate Ray Jennings, the Marine serving a life sentence for the crime. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray and Wilmer Valderrama

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A single mother faces charges of child neglect after her six-year-old daughter is discovered home alone. However, Benson suspects there is more to her story and his investigations reveal she not only suffered sexual abuse as a child but also featured in scores of images and videos popular with online paedophiles - forcing the woman to face up to her past. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is assigned round-the-clock security when sadistic killer William Lewis makes contact with her after escaping from his hospital prison guard. After murdering his doctor, he abducts and threatens to kill the woman's daughter unless Benson admits she lied during his trial - a confession that leads her to an abandoned granary, where the killer indulges in a devastating game of Russian roulette. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Pablo Schreiber

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick finds out about Juliette's relationship with Renard - who is frantically searching for the key - and can barely control the urge for revenge. Monroe and Rosalee piece together information about the curse and eventually work out how the passion spell can be broken. Meanwhile, Adalind returns to Renard's duplicitous brother in Vienna

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Three Wesen break the laws of their race by openly revealing their supernatural nature while committing a series of bank robberies, and Juliette is tormented by hallucinations

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed
