programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe question a disabled boy's bereaved family in an attempt to establish whether his death was a mercy killing or cold-blooded murder, and discover his mother is not as respectable as she makes herself out to be. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A female cop is found stabbed to death in a park alongside a Hispanic male with a near-fatal gunshot wound. Further investigations lead Briscoe and Curtis to a girl who suffered a tough childhood in the care of an abusive father and drug-addicted mother, and her alibi appears to be flimsy at best. Robert Vaughn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Logan are approached by a woman who claims she passed out in a taxi and awoke to find her newborn baby missing. Investigating her allegation, they uncover a gang who specialise in kidnapping children to order. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman lies in a coma after being found with a bullet in her head, leaving Briscoe and Logan to investigate whether her abusive husband is responsible for shooting her. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A childhood friend of Gibbs' dead daughter is stalked by a marine who recently returned from Iraq, and asks the agent for help. Memories of his murdered family lead him to make the case a priority, but he acts on his initiative and leaves HQ without his badge, making DiNozzo fear he is risking his job for a personal vendetta. Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A taxi driver and an admiral working at the Pentagon are found executed by the side of a road, but the agents have trouble ascertaining a motive - until they uncover links to a woman searching for her missing husband, a political refugee from Africa. Meanwhile, McGee makes a discovery about his new girlfriend. Starring Sean Murray, Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby babysits a bright nine-year-old while the other members of the team try to locate the youngster's missing father - a survivalist wanted in connection with a case of robbery and murder. The search takes them deep into the wilderness - where a startling discovery awaits. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Bishop pursue a teenage Svengali who has brainwashed three girls into committing multiple homicides in the cause of a warped philosophy. It soon transpires there is more to the innocent-looking island community than meets the eye. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Samantha Buck

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU team is called to investigate when a famous violinist staying at a four-star hotel reports being raped by her colleague. However, on pursuing the accusation, the man in question claims to have no memory of the incident, but reveals he was recently drugged and robbed by a hired escort girl. Meanwhile, Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower, and the event co-incides with the re-emergence of the detective's fugitive sister Kim. Crime drama, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Lindsay Pulsipher

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The Bakers, the stars of America's top reality TV show, are rocked by scandal when 13-year-old daughter Lane is discovered to be three months pregnant. Ultra-conservative parents Pam and Frank resist SVU involvement in a misguided attempt to shield their 10 children - and their lucrative TV empire - from disgrace. However, when Lane accuses one of the show's cameramen of raping her, one who happens to have already had a vasectomy, it becomes clear the Bakers are trying to protect someone. Unable to aid in the inquiry due to her own pregnancy, Rollins decides to make good use of her time away from the beat to binge-watch the Bakers' show in an effort to identify potential suspects. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sergeant Benson is rescued by the squad following William Lewis's death. However, her strife continues when her actions are investigated by the Internal Affairs department, and head prosecutor Derek Strauss calls for her arrest. Starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Murphy question a television producer when he is accused of molesting his daughter. His estranged wife wants justice for her child, but her failure to cooperate leads the detectives to suspect the accusation was a spiteful ploy. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Donal Logue

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When a mysterious case of sudden blindness results in a woman's death, Nick and Hank encounter an insect-like Wesen that appears to feed off its bereaved victim's tears. Meanwhile, Adalind weighs up the significance of her new situation, while Juliette continues to work with Rosalee in an effort to bring her memory back. Russell Hornsby and David Giuntoli star

programme.desc: Nick and Hank try to track a mysterious Wesen killer who marks his victims using an online game. Fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli and Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly appointed judge is knocked over and killed while trying to escape from the tabloid journalist who has been harassing her. programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.desc: A jockey is shot dead, leading Fontana and Falco into the murkier side of horse racing, where they discover the victim's prized thoroughbred was bought by a corporate boss using embezzled funds. McCoy takes control in court, but a witness's emotional outburst and the defendant's disappearance put the case in jeopardy. Starring Dennis Farina, Michael Imperioli and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A police officer is shot dead and the chief suspect's confession appears to bring an end to the matter, but his media-savvy lawyer presents a case accusing the force of a string of errors - as well as perceived racism. Guest starring Gregory Hines, in his final acting role before his death

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a teenager is found dead at a high-school party, the detectives go to great lengths to secure convictions against the two leading suspects. To complicate matters, a juror's attraction to Connie looks set to disrupt the subsequent trial. Drama, starring Alana De La Garza

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A psychotherapist is shot dead, and his wife stands trial for murder when it is revealed the man was involved in an inappropriate relationship with one of his teenage clients. However, when the widow reveals she was also one of the doctor's victims in her youth, the DA's office is forced to prove that childhood traumas are no excuse for killing someone

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Japanese nightclub owner is killed while visiting New York, and a singer who once worked for the victim is arrested on suspicion of murder. While working on the case, Olivet is forced to confront memories of her sexual assault. Guest starring Laura Linney

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Assistant DAs McCoy and Kincaid put their careers on the line in search of the truth behind the death of a wealthy woman. Meanwhile, detectives question the victim's first and second husbands, and her teenage daughter

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A traumatised marine escapes from a psychiatric unit, convinced he is still fighting in Iraq. The agents believe his erratic behaviour indicates post-traumatic stress disorder and try to calmly talk him round before restraining him. However, blood tests reveal high levels of steroids in his system - meaning someone is using him as a human lab rat. Starring Lauren Holly, Sean Murray and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Muslim US Marine is found seemingly shot dead near a mosque that has been linked to an al-Qaeda recruiter. Ducky refuses to perform an autopsy out of respect for the man's religion, but Abby runs tests that reveal his demise was actually due to poisoning from a rare octopus venom. Meanwhile, McGee goes into the mosque intending to plant a concealed microphone - but discovers someone has had the same idea

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team set up a stake-out at a storage facility to catch a thief suspected of selling hi-tech Navy equipment on the black market, but end up witnessing a murder. To make matters worse, $90million worth of radar gear goes missing while they are distracted. Meanwhile, Ducky asks Abby to run a series of mysterious blood tests, raising suspicions that he is harbouring a secret

programme.title: The Murders

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Crime drama, starring Danny Pino, Mariska Hargitay and Richard Belzer

programme.title: Tashi

programme.title: Pocket Dragon Adventures
programme.desc: A group of very small dragons live with a kindly old wizard, they're not big enough to fly but that doesn't stop them having many adventures

programme.title: Charlton Heston Presents the Bible
programme.desc: The renowned actor serves as storyteller an ancient Roman amphitheatre and other locales in Israel provide the settings, bringing the King James text to life

programme.title: The Watchmaker ()
programme.desc: Shot on 16mm film in 1991. Documentary about Clifford Bowler's watchmaking shop in West Hampstead. Clifford was a Mill Lane tradesman for over 67 years

programme.title: The Big Shilling
programme.desc: A slice of London social history as crane & ball expert George Lovegrove recalls his life 'balling' buildings and his family history of a dynasty of demolition men

programme.title: The Boy Who Thought He Could Fly ()
programme.desc: A young boy grieving the loss of his mother convinces himself he can fly

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: Trouble in Store (1953)
programme.desc: A well-meaning department store worker dreams of becoming a window dresser, but only ends up infuriating his boss with his clumsiness. He gets the chance to be a hero when he and the shopgirl of his dreams stumble on a plot to rob the store. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Margaret Rutherford, Moira Lister, Joan Sims, Jerry Desmonde and Lana Morris

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The story of the musical, an art form that emerged from vaudeville, operetta, burlesque and the British music hall. Featuring a script by Stephen Sondheim

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Anne tells Mike she thinks they ought to spice up their sex life by experimenting with a spot of bondage _ but isn't prepared for the disconcerting enthusiasm with which he embraces the idea. It isn't just his Heath Robinson system of ropes and pulleys she objects to, but the discovery that he's started sharing all their intimate secrets with the lads back at the shop

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Comedy set in a DIY shop where the customer is always wrong. Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz star

programme.title: The Best of IBA Fight Night
programme.desc: Alan Mortlock brings you the best bouts from his IBA unlicensed boxing events from events across London and Essex. See prize fighting in its raw form as contenders go toe-to-toe in the ring

programme.title: Shooting Fish (1997)
programme.desc: Two con-men concoct a series of cunning schemes in an effort to steal enough money to buy their own stately home and live in the lap of luxury for the rest of their days - but the unexpected intervention of a gorgeous woman throws their plan into disarray. Romantic comedy, starring Kate Beckinsale, Stuart Townsend, Dan Futterman, Peter Capaldi and Nickolas Grace

programme.title: Sex Ed (2014)
programme.desc: A teacher arrives at a new school, and is appalled to discover his teenage students are receiving no sex education. He takes it upon himself to provide the facts of life, despite objection from the local preacher. However, his plan is complicated by his still being a virgin and falling in love with a pupil's older sister. Comedy, starring Haley Joel Osment and Lorenza Izzo

programme.title: The Comic Strip Presents
programme.desc: Street gang members Passion and Little Sister are released from prison, only to find that their psychotic group has disbanded in their absence. Nevertheless, they manage to get the Slags regrouped and begin planning a showdown with benevolent rivals the Hawaiians. However, matters become complicated when Little Sister falls in love with their leader. Comedy drama, with Jennifer Saunders and Dawn French

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The story of Tin Pan Alley, where hit records were made to order and the first sightings of the popular music industry emerged. With contributions by Bing Crosby and Perry Como

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.desc: The geese encounter a monster, but it turns out to be a harmless and toothless old wolverine

programme.title: Nils Holgersson

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack transforms into a monkey, and the change will be permanent unless he can persuade a simian princess to kiss him before sunset

programme.desc: A potion designed to make the Warlord super strong shrinks him instead, and he gets carried off by a kingfisher

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Gary goes to the pub to drown his sorrows, so Dermot invites Deborah to their flat for a romantic evening of candlelight, dinner and music. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: Kingston in Decay?
programme.desc: Shops, housing, attractions, local industry - all are subject to the lens and commentary of a Kingston & District Cine Club member in this amateur film. Shot on 8mm film

programme.title: This Is London
programme.desc: Take a tour of London through some of the city's most exciting, trendiest businesses and products, featuring ads from Elan Cafe, Cityspace, The Oblique Life and more

programme.title: Paper!
programme.desc: A piece of London history. Shot in the 1960's on 8mm film featuring the many news vendors around London selling the three evening newspapers

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: The High Bright Sun (1965)
programme.desc: A military officer in 1950s Cyprus tries to negotiate a truce with a partisan leader during an uprising against the British occupation. Drama, with Dirk Bogarde and George Chakiris

programme.title: Hell is Sold Out (1951)
programme.desc: An author long assumed dead makes a surprise return, only to find books he did not write are being published under his name. He discovers that another writer, claiming to be his widow, is passing off her own creations as his previously unseen work to get them published. Drama, starring Mai Zetterling, Herbert Lom and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: A Year at Kew
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, a student at Kew in the 1970s, offers an insight into the work carried out behind the scenes by the 150 staff at the Royal Botanic Gardens, which house a diverse collection of plants and are a leading centre for scientific research and conservation

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: Landmark series from the 1970s, telling the story of swing. Featuring archive footage and contributions from Frank Sinatra, Bing Crosby, Benny Goodman and Woody Herman

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Comedy following the life of divorcee Jimmy Venables after his former wife leaves to perform charity work in Africa, prompting his mother-in-law to move in to the family home. Nicholas Lyndhurst and Celia Imrie star

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Camden and Sydenham for locals and tourists.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: The series exploring Britain's criminal underworld returns, beginning with profiles of Liverpool-based gangsters Stephen 'the Devil' French and Boris Boszomenyi

programme.title: My Big Fat Fetish
programme.desc: The lives of four overweight women who have chosen not to diet, and have instead attracted online followings of men who pay to watch them eat. Lizzie, from Leeds, travels to America to take part in a photoshoot for a website run by 29-stone model Reenaye, while dental assistant Kitt discusses how she and her boyfriend find sexual pleasure from her weight gains. The programme also features 44-stone Patty, who has become a semi-invalid and requires constant care from her son, but still performs 'squashings' for customers who pay her to sit and bounce on them

programme.title: Abraham's Point (2008)
programme.desc: A man who left his childhood home in Wales 15 years previously decides to face up to his troubled past. He steals a grandfather clock and takes it on a journey across the country, intending to return the vintage timepiece to his father, who is dying. Drama, starring Mackenzie Crook and Joseph Milson

programme.title: Reaper (2014)
programme.desc: A death row inmate is sent to the electric chair, but the execution goes wrong and transforms him into a deadly supernatural creature that destroys everything in its path. He sets out to slaughter a group of criminals lying low in a hotel, but a hitch-hiker organises the crooks to fight back. Horror, starring Danny Trejo and Vinnie Jones

programme.title: Emmanuelle in Soho (1981)
programme.desc: A woman seeking fame and fortune in Soho plays a pivotal role in the struggling marriage of a photographer and his wife, and conspires with them on a plot to blackmail a pornography producer. Erotic drama, starring Angie Quick and Julie Lee

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: Anne tells Mike she thinks they ought to spice up their sex life by experimenting with a spot of bondage _ but isn't prepared for the disconcerting enthusiasm with which he embraces the idea. It isn't just his Heath Robinson system of ropes and pulleys she objects to, but the discovery that he's started sharing all their intimate secrets with the lads back at the shop

Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton

programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.desc: The story of Baltimore Ravens' 2000 Super Bowl success over New York Giants at the Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, Florida. programme.desc: A look back at New England Patriots' 2003 Super Bowl victory over Carolina Panthers at the Reliant Stadium in Houston, Texas. The Patriots claimed a narrow 32-29 victory, in what is widely considered by pundits as one of the greatest Super Bowls of all time

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Pittsburgh Steelers' 2005 Super Bowl triumph over Seattle Seahawks at Ford Field in Detroit, Michigan. The Steelers became the fourth wildcard team to win the NFL's showpiece encounter as they claimed their fifth title overall, a feat that at the time could only be matched by the San Francisco 49ers and the Dallas Cowboys
